ideology.en: Hindu nationalism, integral humanism, cultural nationalism, anti-communism and anti-Muslim separatism

relationship.zh: 印度人民同盟是国大党世俗主义路线的主要右翼挑战者，在北印度印地语地区拥有稳定但有限的选民基础。1962年中印战争后，人民同盟借民族主义情绪上升之机加强对尼赫鲁政府软弱外交和国防失败的批评，要求更强硬的反华反巴立场。
relationship.en: The Bharatiya Jana Sangh was the principal right-wing challenger to Congress's secular line, with a stable but limited voter base in Hindi-speaking northern India. After the 1962 Sino-Indian War, the Jana Sangh capitalized on rising nationalist sentiment to intensify criticism of the Nehru government's weak diplomacy and defense failures, demanding a harder anti-China and anti-Pakistan stance.

description.zh: 印度人民同盟由国民志愿服务团（RSS）推动于1951年成立，是后来印度人民党（BJP）的前身。创始人希亚马·普拉萨德·穆克吉主张强烈的印度文化认同和反巴基斯坦立场。乌帕德亚雅提出的「整体人道主义」试图为印度教民族主义提供一套超越西方资本主义和马克思主义的替代意识形态框架。该党在议会中席位有限，但通过RSS的基层组织网络拥有远超议会代表性的社会动员能力。1962年战争失败为该党的国防民族主义叙事提供了有力论据。
description.en: The Bharatiya Jana Sangh was founded in 1951 under the impetus of the Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh (RSS), serving as the predecessor of today's Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP). Founder Syama Prasad Mukherjee advocated a strong Indian cultural identity and anti-Pakistan stance. Upadhyaya's 'integral humanism' attempted to provide Hindu nationalism with an alternative ideological framework transcending both Western capitalism and Marxism. The party held limited parliamentary seats but possessed social mobilization capacity far exceeding its parliamentary representation through the RSS grassroots network. The 1962 war defeat provided powerful ammunition for the party's defense-nationalist narrative.

name.zh: 迪恩达亚尔·乌帕德亚雅

role.zh: 党的理论家和组织核心，整体人道主义的提出者
role.en: Party theoretician and organizational core, originator of integral humanism

name.zh: 阿塔尔·比哈里·瓦杰帕伊

role.zh: 党内新生代雄辩家，日后的印度总理
role.en: Rising orator of the new generation, future Prime Minister of India

leader.zh: 什里帕德·阿姆里特·丹吉

leaderTitle.en: Chairman of the Communist Party of India

ideology.zh: 马克思主义、议会道路、支持工农运动、亲苏联路线
ideology.en: Marxism, parliamentary path, support for worker and peasant movements, pro-Soviet line

relationship.zh: 印度共产党是议会第三大党，在喀拉拉邦和西孟加拉邦拥有强大群众基础。1962年中印战争对党造成严重冲击：亲苏派支持政府抗战立场，亲华派则态度暧昧，导致党内分裂加剧，数百名亲华党员被政府逮捕。这一裂痕最终在1964年导致印共分裂为印度共产党和印度共产党（马克思主义）。
relationship.en: The CPI was the third-largest parliamentary party, with strong mass bases in Kerala and West Bengal. The 1962 Sino-Indian War severely impacted the party: the pro-Soviet faction supported the government's war stance while the pro-China faction remained ambiguous, deepening internal splits and leading to the arrest of hundreds of pro-China members by the government. This rift ultimately caused the party to split in 1964 into the CPI and the CPI (Marxist).

description.zh: 印度共产党成立于1925年，是南亚最早的共产主义政党之一。1957年在喀拉拉邦通过选举上台执政，成为世界上首个通过民主选举掌权的共产党政府之一。丹吉领导的主流派主张议会道路和与国大党的有限合作，坚持亲苏联立场。但党内一直存在以南布迪里巴德和孙达拉雅为代表的亲华激进派，主张武装革命和农民运动。中苏分裂和中印战争使这一矛盾激化到无法调和的程度，最终导致1964年的历史性分裂。
description.en: Founded in 1925, the CPI was one of South Asia's earliest communist parties. In 1957 it won power in Kerala through elections, becoming one of the world's first communist governments to attain office through democratic means. The mainstream faction led by Dange advocated the parliamentary path and limited cooperation with Congress, maintaining a pro-Soviet stance. But a pro-China radical wing represented by Namboodiripad and Sundarayya persistently advocated armed revolution and peasant movements. The Sino-Soviet split and the Sino-Indian War intensified this contradiction to the point of irreconcilability, ultimately producing the historic split of 1964.

name.zh: 什里帕德·阿姆里特·丹吉

role.zh: 亲苏派领袖，主张议会道路和与国大党合作
role.en: Pro-Soviet leader, advocating the parliamentary path and cooperation with Congress

role.zh: 党内反主流派核心，1964年分裂后成为印共（马）领袖
role.en: Core anti-mainstream figure, became CPI(M) leader after the 1964 split

title.en: Former General Secretary of the CPI

role.zh: 1962年初去世的前领导人，其去世加速了党内派系斗争
role.en: Former leader who died in early 1962, whose passing accelerated factional struggle within the party

name.zh: 巴基斯坦伊斯兰共和国

governmentForm.zh: 总统制共和国，在军事主导下运作，并依据1962年宪法推行“基本民主制”间接政治体制
governmentForm.en: A presidential republic operating under military dominance, with an indirect political system based on the 1962 Constitution and the Basic Democracies framework

socialStructure.zh: 国家由西巴基斯坦与东巴基斯坦两大地理单元组成，社会结构包括军官与高级官僚精英、地主与工商阶层、城市中产阶层、农民、工人及宗教人士。东西两翼在语言、经济资源分配与政治代表权上存在明显不平衡。
socialStructure.en: The state consisted of two major geographic wings, West Pakistan and East Pakistan. Its social structure included military officers and senior bureaucratic elites, landlords and business groups, an urban middle class, peasants, workers, and religious figures. Significant imbalances existed between the two wings in language, economic allocation, and political representation.

rulingClass.zh: 军方高层、中央官僚、地主精英以及与国家关系密切的工业金融集团
rulingClass.en: Senior military leadership, central bureaucrats, landed elites, and industrial-financial groups closely tied to the state

succession.zh: 总统并非通过普选产生，而是依宪法与政治控制机制由间接选举或体制内安排决定；在现实上，继承高度依赖军方与官僚体系支持
succession.en: The president was not chosen by direct universal suffrage but through constitutional and controlled indirect electoral mechanisms; in practice, succession depended heavily on support from the military and bureaucracy

structure.zh: 1962年巴基斯坦实行新宪制，总统掌握广泛行政权，中央政府权力强，立法机构作用受限。国家虽为共和国，但政治运作受到军方深刻影响；地方层面则通过“基本民主制”建立自下而上的间接代表体系。
structure.en: In 1962 Pakistan operated under a new constitutional order in which the president held broad executive authority and the central government was strong while the legislature remained constrained. Though formally a republic, political operation was deeply influenced by the military. At the local level, the Basic Democracies system provided an indirect representative structure from below.

function.zh: 负责军队行政、国防政策、军备采购及与盟国的军事合作
function.en: Responsible for military administration, defense policy, arms procurement, and military cooperation with allied states

function.zh: 负责预算、税收、对外援助协调、债务管理与货币财政政策制定
function.en: Responsible for budgeting, taxation, foreign aid coordination, debt management, and fiscal policy formation

function.zh: 负责国内治安、警务、边境管理、行政秩序与部分政治监控事务
function.en: Responsible for internal security, policing, border management, administrative order, and some political surveillance functions

function.zh: 负责对外关系、驻外使团、国际组织联络以及与美国、中国、伊斯兰国家等的战略往来
function.en: Responsible for external relations, diplomatic missions, international organization liaison, and strategic engagement with the United States, China, and Muslim countries

function.zh: 负责工业发展、进出口政策、贸易促进与国家经济规划配合
function.en: Responsible for industrial development, import-export policy, trade promotion, and coordination with national economic planning

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政通过省级政府、专区、县以及“基本民主制”基层单位运作。西巴基斯坦因“一体化方案”被整合为单一省级单位，而东巴基斯坦则作为另一主要行政翼存在。地方治理在形式上具有代表性，但中央控制力很强。
localAdmin.en: Local administration operated through provincial governments, divisions, districts, and the grassroots Basic Democracies units. West Pakistan was consolidated into a single provincial unit under the One Unit scheme, while East Pakistan existed as the other main administrative wing. Local governance had a representative appearance, but central control remained strong.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以英属印度时期普通法传统为基础，辅以成文法、行政法规及有限度的伊斯兰法影响。最高法院与高等法院继续运作，但政治体制下司法独立性受到行政与戒严遗绪影响。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on the common law tradition inherited from British India, supplemented by statutes, administrative regulations, and limited Islamic legal influence. The Supreme Court and High Courts continued to function, though judicial independence was affected by executive dominance and the legacy of martial rule.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以关税、消费税、所得税、企业税和土地相关税收为主。由于工业基础有限且农业部门征税能力不足，国家财政在很大程度上依赖贸易税、间接税与外援。
taxationSystem.en: The taxation system relied mainly on customs duties, excise taxes, income tax, corporate taxation, and land-related revenue. Because the industrial base was limited and agricultural taxation weak, the state depended heavily on trade taxes, indirect taxation, and foreign assistance.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教为国家最主要宗教，逊尼派占多数，什叶派亦有相当人口；宗教在国家认同、教育与公共生活中具有核心地位。少数群体包括印度教徒、基督徒、佛教徒及其他宗教社群，主要分布于东巴基斯坦和部分城市地区。
religion.en: Islam was the dominant religion of the state, with a Sunni majority and a significant Shia minority. Religion occupied a central place in national identity, education, and public life. Minority communities included Hindus, Christians, Buddhists, and others, especially in East Pakistan and some urban areas.

philosophy.zh: 国家意识形态结合穆斯林民族主义、发展主义、反共立场与秩序优先观念。统治集团强调现代化、技术官僚治理和强有力中央国家，同时试图以伊斯兰认同弥合东西两翼差异。
philosophy.en: State ideology combined Muslim nationalism, developmentalism, anti-communism, and a preference for order. The ruling establishment emphasized modernization, technocratic governance, and a strong central state, while also trying to use Islamic identity to bridge differences between the two wings.

writingSystem.zh: 乌尔都语主要使用波斯-阿拉伯字母书写，孟加拉语使用孟加拉文字；英语广泛用于政府、司法、高等教育与军政精英层。
writingSystem.en: Urdu was written primarily in the Perso-Arabic script, Bengali in the Bengali script, and English remained widely used in government, law, higher education, and among military-administrative elites.

culturalAchievements.zh: 1962年前后的巴基斯坦文化成就体现在乌尔都文学、孟加拉文学、广播与电影、现代建筑和国家宣传艺术的发展上。卡拉奇、拉合尔、达卡等地形成活跃的出版、音乐与知识分子圈层；同时国家赞助的现代主义建筑与城市规划开始显现。
culturalAchievements.en: Pakistan’s cultural achievements around 1962 were visible in Urdu literature, Bengali literature, radio and cinema, modern architecture, and state-sponsored visual culture. Karachi, Lahore, and Dacca supported active publishing, music, and intellectual circles, while state-backed modernist architecture and urban planning were beginning to emerge.

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言包括印欧语系的乌尔都语、旁遮普语、信德语、普什图语、孟加拉语及其他地区语言；英语作为行政和精英通用语具有重要地位。
languageFamily.en: Major languages included Indo-European languages such as Urdu, Punjabi, Sindhi, Pashto, Bengali, and other regional tongues; English held major importance as the language of administration and elite communication.

gdpDescription.zh: 1962年的巴基斯坦仍属低收入发展中国家，但在第二个五年计划推动下，工业化与基础设施建设已有明显进展。西巴基斯坦的工业和行政资源较集中，东巴基斯坦则在黄麻出口方面极具重要性。经济增长速度在发展中国家中较快，但地区失衡显著。
gdpDescription.en: In 1962 Pakistan remained a low-income developing country, but under the Second Five-Year Plan industrialization and infrastructure building had made visible progress. Industrial and administrative resources were concentrated more heavily in West Pakistan, while East Pakistan was crucial for jute exports. Economic growth was relatively fast by developing-country standards, but regional imbalance was pronounced.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、棉纺织、黄麻加工、食品加工、皮革、水泥、糖业、轻工业、港口贸易及初步机械制造
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, cotton textiles, jute processing, food processing, leather, cement, sugar, light industry, port trade, and early-stage machinery manufacturing

tradeGoods.zh: 主要出口棉花、棉纱、纺织品、黄麻及黄麻制品、皮革、茶叶和鱼类；主要进口机械设备、工业原料、石油产品、交通工具和部分粮食
tradeGoods.en: Major exports included cotton, cotton yarn, textiles, jute and jute manufactures, leather, tea, and fish; major imports included machinery, industrial inputs, petroleum products, vehicles, and some foodstuffs

householdWealth.zh: 多数家庭财富有限，主要以土地使用权、牲畜、住房、金银饰品和少量现金储蓄体现。城市中产阶层拥有较稳定工资收入，而农村家庭普遍脆弱，易受洪水、歉收和物价波动影响。
householdWealth.en: Most households possessed limited wealth, expressed mainly in land use rights, livestock, housing, gold or silver ornaments, and small cash savings. Urban middle-class households had more stable salaried income, while rural families were generally vulnerable to floods, poor harvests, and price fluctuations.

unit.en: 1962 US dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 国家引导的混合经济，以私营企业、出口农业和工业化规划并行发展，并高度依赖外援、优惠贷款和国际金融机构支持
economicSystem.en: A state-guided mixed economy combining private enterprise, export agriculture, and planned industrialization, with heavy reliance on foreign aid, concessional lending, and international financial support

source.zh: 国有企业、铁路与邮电收入
source.en: State enterprises, railways, and posts-telegraphs revenue

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库状况总体可控，但高度依赖外援、贷款和出口创汇。财政稳定受国防负担、发展支出以及东西两翼行政成本影响。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was broadly manageable, but heavily dependent on foreign aid, loans, and export earnings. Fiscal stability was affected by defense burdens, development expenditures, and the administrative costs of governing the two wings.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 政府实行偏发展主义财政政策，在控制通胀与维持投资之间寻求平衡，通过外援和计划性公共支出推动工业化与基础设施建设，同时维持较高国防投入。
fiscalPolicy.en: The government followed a developmentalist fiscal policy, balancing inflation control with investment needs, using foreign aid and planned public spending to drive industrialization and infrastructure building while maintaining high defense expenditures.

description.zh: 国家最核心的武装力量，负责对印防御、边境安全以及在国内政治中的关键支撑作用，军官团对国家决策影响极大。
description.en: The core armed force of the state, responsible for defense against India, border security, and a key supporting role in domestic politics; the officer corps held great influence over national decision-making.

description.zh: 规模较小但训练水平较高，受美国军事援助影响显著，装备喷气式战斗机并强调机动防空与战术支援。
description.en: Relatively small but well trained, heavily influenced by US military aid, equipped with jet fighters and focused on mobile air defense and tactical support.

description.zh: 主要负责阿拉伯海沿岸与港口防务，规模有限，重点在海上巡逻、护航与海军基础设施维护。
description.en: Primarily responsible for the Arabian Sea coastline and port defense, limited in size and focused on patrol, escort, and naval infrastructure maintenance.

name.zh: 准军事部队与边防力量

description.zh: 包括边防、民兵与辅助安全部队，用于边境管控、内地治安和特定地区的安全任务。
description.en: Included frontier, militia, and auxiliary security forces used for border control, internal security, and security duties in particular regions.

commanderInChief.zh: 总统穆罕默德·阿尤布·汗兼任最高统帅
commanderInChief.en: President Muhammad Ayub Khan as supreme commander

technology.zh: 军队技术水平在南亚处于较高位置，尤其是空军和通信系统受美国援助明显提升。主要装备包括美制坦克、火炮、运输设备与喷气式飞机，但整体军工基础薄弱，后勤仍依赖进口与盟友支持。
technology.en: Military technology stood at a relatively high level within South Asia, especially in the air force and communications systems, which were significantly improved through US aid. Major equipment included US-made tanks, artillery, transport assets, and jet aircraft, though the domestic arms industry was weak and logistics still depended on imports and allied support.

threats.zh: 主要外部威胁来自印度，核心争议为克什米尔问题；此外还需关注阿富汗在普什图尼斯坦问题上的压力。内部层面，东西巴基斯坦的政治与民族紧张虽未全面失控，但已构成长期安全隐患。
threats.en: The principal external threat came from India, centered on the Kashmir dispute; Pakistan also had to watch Afghan pressure over the Pashtunistan issue. Internally, political and ethnic tensions between East and West Pakistan had not yet fully broken down but already posed a long-term security risk.

populationDescription.zh: 1962年巴基斯坦人口约一亿，其中东巴基斯坦人口多于西巴基斯坦。全国人口增长快、年龄结构年轻，农村人口占绝大多数，土地压力与就业问题逐渐突出。
populationDescription.en: In 1962 Pakistan’s population was about 100 million, with East Pakistan more populous than West Pakistan. The population was growing rapidly, skewed young, and remained overwhelmingly rural, with mounting pressure on land and employment.

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层包括军政官僚精英、大地主与部族首领、工商业资产阶级、城市白领与专业人士、小商贩、工人以及广大农民。东巴基斯坦农民与城市知识分子数量庞大，而西巴基斯坦的军官、地主和工商精英在国家权力中占优势。
socialClasses.en: Social classes included military-bureaucratic elites, large landlords and tribal notables, the commercial and industrial bourgeoisie, urban white-collar and professional groups, petty traders, workers, and a vast peasantry. East Pakistan contained a large peasant and urban intelligentsia population, while military officers, landlords, and business elites from West Pakistan held disproportionate state power.

allies.zh: 美国、英国、伊朗、土耳其以及东南亚条约组织和中央条约组织中的反共伙伴；同时与中华人民共和国关系正在改善
allies.en: The United States, the United Kingdom, Iran, Turkey, and anti-communist partners in SEATO and CENTO; relations with the People’s Republic of China were also improving

enemies.zh: 印度为首要对手；与阿富汗关系紧张但未进入全面敌对状态
enemies.en: India was the principal adversary; relations with Afghanistan were tense though short of full enmity

foreignPolicy.zh: 巴基斯坦1962年的外交政策以安全优先、反共合作、多边结盟和对印制衡为核心。它继续作为美国在冷战中的地区伙伴，参与SEATO与CENTO，同时在中印战争后逐步加强与中国的接触，以拓宽战略空间。
foreignPolicy.en: Pakistan’s foreign policy in 1962 centered on security, anti-communist cooperation, multilateral alliance commitments, and balancing India. It continued as a regional partner of the United States in the Cold War through SEATO and CENTO, while also gradually deepening contact with China after the Sino-Indian War in order to widen its strategic room for maneuver.

era.zh: 冷战时代

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术与制度进展包括大型灌溉与河流工程规划、铁路与港口现代化、喷气式空军建设、无线电通信扩展、工业纺织机械引进以及首都与行政设施现代规划。虽非科技强国，但在发展中国家中具备一定制度化现代化能力。
keyInnovations.en: Key technological and institutional advances included large irrigation and river-control planning, railway and port modernization, jet air force development, expanded radio communications, imported industrial textile machinery, and modern planning for capital and administrative facilities. Though not a scientific great power, Pakistan possessed a notable capacity for organized modernization among developing countries.

strengths.zh: 国家拥有纪律严密的军队、相对高效的官僚体系、重要的地缘战略位置以及来自西方的援助与军事支持。工业化起步较快，农业出口尤其是黄麻和棉花为财政与外汇提供支撑。
strengths.en: The state possessed a disciplined military, a relatively efficient bureaucracy, an important geostrategic position, and access to Western aid and military support. Industrialization had begun at a respectable pace, while agricultural exports—especially jute and cotton—supported fiscal and foreign-exchange needs.

weaknesses.zh: 最严重弱点是东西两翼分离、人口与资源分布不均、政治代表失衡以及民族语言矛盾。民主制度薄弱，过度依赖军方与官僚统治；经济上对外援和少数出口品依赖较深，贫困与地区差距明显。
weaknesses.en: Its gravest weaknesses were the separation of the two wings, uneven distribution of population and resources, imbalanced political representation, and ethno-linguistic tensions. Democratic institutions were weak and overly dependent on military-bureaucratic rule; economically, the country relied heavily on foreign aid and a narrow export base, while poverty and regional inequality remained severe.

outlook.zh: 1962年的巴基斯坦表面稳定，短期内在阿尤布·汗政权下仍有能力维持秩序并推动发展。然而若不能妥善处理东巴基斯坦的不满、与印度的长期对抗以及体制合法性问题，中长期前景将趋于不稳。
outlook.en: In 1962 Pakistan appeared stable and, under Ayub Khan, retained the capacity to preserve order and push development in the short term. However, unless it could address East Pakistan’s grievances, the long confrontation with India, and the issue of regime legitimacy, its medium- to long-term outlook would become increasingly unstable.

description.zh: 包括西巴基斯坦与东巴基斯坦的军事主导国家，是冷战中的美国盟友之一。
description.en: A military-led state comprising West and East Pakistan, and one of the U.S. allies in the Cold War.

ruler.zh: 伊丽莎白二世；西丽玛沃·班达拉奈克

governmentForm.zh: 英联邦自治领式议会民主立宪君主制，采用威斯敏斯特体制
governmentForm.en: A Commonwealth realm parliamentary democratic constitutional monarchy operating under the Westminster system

socialStructure.zh: 社会以农村农民和种植园劳工为主体，城市中产阶层、商人、专业人士与公务员规模不断扩大；僧伽、乡村精英、种植园资本与政党组织共同影响社会秩序。僧伽罗人与泰米尔人构成主要族群，穆斯林与伯格人等少数群体也具重要经济与社会作用。
socialStructure.en: Society was centered on rural peasants and plantation labor, with a growing urban middle class of merchants, professionals, and civil servants. The Buddhist sangha, village elites, plantation capital, and party organizations all shaped social order. Sinhalese and Tamils formed the principal communities, while Muslims, Burghers, and other minorities retained important economic and social roles.

rulingClass.zh: 执政阶层由总理领导的议会多数派、内阁部长、高级文官、司法精英、地方地主与种植园和商业界上层组成，名义国家元首为女王，由总督代表。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted of the parliamentary majority led by the prime minister, cabinet ministers, senior civil servants, judicial elites, local landed notables, and upper circles in plantation and commercial interests, while the monarch remained the formal head of state represented by the governor-general.

succession.zh: 王位依温莎王朝及英国王位继承规则世袭；政府首脑由在议会中拥有多数支持者出任总理。
succession.en: The crown passed hereditarily within the House of Windsor according to the succession rules shared with the British monarchy; the head of government was the prime minister commanding a majority in parliament.

structure.zh: 中央政府由女王、总督、内阁、众议院与参议院构成。行政权实际上由总理及内阁行使，议会负责立法，司法体系沿袭英式普通法与成文法结合的模式。1962年政局总体稳定，但同年发生未遂军事与警察政变，促使政府强化对安全机构的控制。
structure.en: The central government consisted of the Queen, governor-general, cabinet, House of Representatives, and Senate. Executive authority was effectively exercised by the prime minister and cabinet, parliament handled legislation, and the judiciary followed a mixed framework of British common law and statute. The polity was generally stable in 1962, though the attempted military and police coup that year prompted tighter government control over the security services.

function.zh: 统筹内阁事务、国家安全、武装部队与战略决策。
function.en: Coordinated cabinet affairs, national security, the armed forces, and strategic decision-making.

function.zh: 负责预算、税收、公共债务、海关和国家财政管理。
function.en: Managed the budget, taxation, public debt, customs, and state finances.

function.zh: 负责省区行政、警务协调、地方政府与内部秩序。
function.en: Handled provincial administration, police coordination, local government, and internal order.

function.zh: 管理稻米生产、土地政策、农业推广与农村发展。
function.en: Oversaw rice production, land policy, agricultural extension, and rural development.

name.en: Ministry of Plantation Industries, Trade and Industry

function.zh: 监管茶叶、橡胶、椰子出口，以及工业促进和对外贸易政策。
function.en: Supervised tea, rubber, and coconut exports, along with industrial promotion and external trade policy.

name.en: Ministry of Education and Cultural Affairs

function.zh: 负责学校体系、高等教育、官方语言政策与文化机构。
function.en: Administered the school system, higher education, official language policy, and cultural institutions.

function.zh: 管理医院、公共卫生、疾病防控与母婴保健。
function.en: Managed hospitals, public health, disease control, and maternal and child welfare.

function.zh: 负责铁路、公路运输、港口协作和邮政电信服务。
function.en: Handled railways, road transport, port coordination, and postal and telecommunications services.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政以省、行政区和村级体系运作，由政府代理官和地方官员执行中央政策；市政会、城镇会与村议会承担基层治理，但中央政府影响力较强。
localAdmin.en: Local administration operated through provinces, administrative districts, and village-level structures, with government agents and local officers implementing central policy. Municipal councils, town councils, and village bodies carried out grassroots governance, though central influence remained strong.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以英国普通法为基础，同时保留罗马-荷兰法传统，并在婚姻与继承等领域对康提法、泰萨瓦拉迈法和穆斯林法予以有限承认。最高法院与下级法院维持司法秩序。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on British common law while retaining Roman-Dutch legal traditions, with limited recognition of Kandyan law, Thesavalamai, and Muslim law in matters such as marriage and inheritance. The Supreme Court and subordinate courts maintained judicial order.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入主要来自进出口关税、消费税、所得税、企业税和国营收入。出口税和贸易税对种植园经济尤为重要，同时国家通过米粮补贴和价格干预影响分配。
taxationSystem.en: State revenue came chiefly from import and export duties, excise taxes, income tax, corporate taxation, and state-sector receipts. Export and trade taxes were especially important to the plantation economy, while the state also shaped distribution through rice subsidies and price intervention.

religion.zh: 上座部佛教居主导地位，并在国家象征与公共生活中具有突出影响；印度教在泰米尔社区中根基深厚，伊斯兰教和基督教亦有重要历史地位。国家并非神权政体，但宗教认同与政治动员密切相关。
religion.en: Theravada Buddhism held the dominant position and enjoyed pronounced influence in national symbolism and public life. Hinduism remained deeply rooted among Tamil communities, while Islam and Christianity also held important historical places. The state was not theocratic, but religious identity was closely tied to political mobilization.

philosophy.zh: 公共思想融合佛教社会伦理、反殖民民族主义、议会民主、福利国家观念与温和社会主义。执政联盟强调本土文化复兴、社会平等和国家主导发展。
philosophy.en: Public thought blended Buddhist social ethics, anti-colonial nationalism, parliamentary democracy, welfare-state ideals, and moderate socialism. The governing coalition emphasized indigenous cultural revival, social equality, and state-led development.

writingSystem.zh: 主要书写系统为僧伽罗文和泰米尔文，英语继续广泛用于高等教育、司法、商业和政府高层事务。
writingSystem.en: The principal writing systems were Sinhala and Tamil scripts, while English remained widely used in higher education, the judiciary, commerce, and upper levels of government.

culturalAchievements.zh: 锡兰在教育普及、印刷出版、僧伽罗与泰米尔文学、广播事业和电影方面持续发展。独立后文化政策强调佛教复兴、民族语言推广与本土戏剧音乐，同时殖民时期形成的英语文学和法律教育传统依然强劲。
culturalAchievements.en: Ceylon continued to advance in mass education, publishing, Sinhala and Tamil literature, broadcasting, and cinema. Post-independence cultural policy stressed Buddhist revival, national language promotion, and indigenous drama and music, while the English-language literary and legal-educational traditions formed under colonial rule remained strong.

languageFamily.zh: 僧伽罗语属印欧语系印度-雅利安语支；泰米尔语属达罗毗荼语系；英语属印欧语系日耳曼语支。
languageFamily.en: Sinhala belonged to the Indo-European Indo-Aryan branch; Tamil to the Dravidian family; and English to the Indo-European Germanic branch.

gdpDescription.zh: 1962年的锡兰经济属于中低收入农业出口型经济，以茶叶、橡胶和椰子三大种植园产品为支柱，同时拥有较高的人类发展水平和较广泛的社会福利体系。国家开始加强进口替代工业化，但整体工业基础仍较薄弱，并依赖出口收入与食品进口平衡。
gdpDescription.en: Ceylon's economy in 1962 was a lower-middle income agrarian export economy centered on the three plantation staples of tea, rubber, and coconut, while also exhibiting relatively high human development and broad social welfare provision. The state had begun to push import-substituting industrialization, but the industrial base remained modest and external earnings were still needed to balance food imports.

mainIndustries.zh: 茶叶种植与加工、橡胶、椰子和椰干、稻米农业、渔业、纺织、食品加工、石墨开采、港口贸易、铁路与公共服务。
mainIndustries.en: Tea cultivation and processing, rubber, coconuts and copra, rice agriculture, fisheries, textiles, food processing, graphite mining, port trade, railways, and public services.

tradeGoods.zh: 出口以茶叶、橡胶、椰子制品、石墨和香料为主；进口以大米、纺织品、机械、石油制品、化肥、车辆和工业原料为主。
tradeGoods.en: Exports were led by tea, rubber, coconut products, graphite, and spices; imports consisted mainly of rice, textiles, machinery, petroleum products, fertilizer, vehicles, and industrial raw materials.

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富分布差异明显：乡村自耕农和公务员家庭拥有有限但较稳定资产，种植园劳工财富极低；城市商业家庭、地主和专业阶层拥有较高储蓄、不动产和教育资本。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was unevenly distributed: peasant smallholders and civil-service households had limited but comparatively stable assets, plantation laborers possessed very little wealth, while urban commercial families, landlords, and professional classes held higher savings, property, and educational capital.

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济体制，国家在贸易、福利、价格调控和部分工业中扮演重要角色，私人种植园、商贸资本和小农经济并存。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economic system in which the state played a major role in trade, welfare, price controls, and parts of industry, while private plantations, mercantile capital, and smallholder agriculture coexisted.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库状况总体可控，但受福利承诺、进口需求和出口价格波动制约。财政缓冲有限，需依靠审慎借款、外汇管理和对种植园出口的持续依赖。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was broadly manageable but constrained by welfare commitments, import needs, and fluctuations in export prices. Fiscal buffers were limited, requiring prudent borrowing, exchange controls, and continued reliance on plantation export earnings.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策强调福利支出、粮食补贴、教育卫生投资与有限工业化，同时维持关税保护和贸易管制。政策在社会公平上较积极，但长期面临赤字和外汇压力。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized welfare spending, food subsidies, education and health investment, and limited industrialization, while maintaining tariff protection and trade controls. It was socially expansive but faced chronic pressures from deficits and foreign-exchange constraints.

description.zh: 以轻步兵和国内治安支援为主，装备多为英制轻武器、迫击炮和有限装甲车辆，主要任务是国土防卫和内部安全。
description.en: Primarily a light infantry force supporting domestic security, equipped largely with British small arms, mortars, and a limited number of armored vehicles, tasked mainly with territorial defence and internal security.

description.zh: 规模较小，负责沿海巡逻、海上交通保护、港口安全和训练合作。
description.en: A small naval force responsible for coastal patrols, protection of sea lines near the island, port security, and training cooperation.

description.zh: 主要承担运输、侦察、训练和有限轻型空中支援任务，作战能力较为有限。
description.en: Mainly carried out transport, reconnaissance, training, and limited light air-support missions, with modest combat capability.

description.zh: 由志愿役和地方辅助单位构成，用于动员补充、设施警备和紧急状态支援。
description.en: Composed of volunteer and local auxiliary units used for mobilization support, infrastructure guarding, and assistance during emergencies.

commanderInChief.zh: 伊丽莎白二世（名义总司令）；实际由总理、国防大臣与军种司令统辖
commanderInChief.en: Elizabeth II (nominal Commander-in-Chief); practical authority exercised by the Prime Minister, Minister of Defence, and service commanders

technology.zh: 军备技术总体处于二战后早期水平，主要依赖英国式训练、轻武器、巡逻舰、运输机和基础通信设备。缺乏重型装甲、喷气战斗机编队和远程打击能力。1962年未遂政变后，政府对军警结构和晋升体系加强审查。
technology.en: Military technology was broadly at an early post-Second World War level, relying mainly on British-style training, small arms, patrol craft, transport aircraft, and basic communications equipment. Heavy armor, jet fighter strength, and long-range strike capability were lacking. After the failed 1962 coup attempt, the government increased scrutiny over military and police organization and promotion.

threats.zh: 主要威胁并非外来入侵，而是内部政治不稳、族群紧张、冷战背景下的意识形态渗透以及海上交通线安全。1962年未遂政变暴露出精英层和安全机构内部的不满与裂痕。
threats.en: The principal threats were not foreign invasion but internal political instability, ethnic tension, ideological penetration in the Cold War context, and the security of maritime communications. The failed 1962 coup exposed dissatisfaction and fractures within elite circles and the security establishment.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约一千万，农村人口占绝大多数。僧伽罗人约占多数，锡兰泰米尔人、印度泰米尔人、摩尔人穆斯林、伯格人和其他少数群体共同构成多民族社会。人口增长较快，但教育与公共卫生水平在南亚地区相对较高。
populationDescription.en: The population was about ten million, with a clear rural majority. Sinhalese formed the majority, while Ceylon Tamils, Indian Tamils, Moor Muslims, Burghers, and other minorities made up a multiethnic society. Population growth was relatively rapid, but educational and public health standards were comparatively high by South Asian standards.

socialClasses.zh: 主要社会阶层包括农村小农与佃农、种植园泰米尔劳工、城市工人、商人和中产专业阶层、公务员与教师、宗教人士，以及拥有土地、资本或政治影响力的上层精英。
socialClasses.en: The main social classes included rural smallholders and tenants, plantation Tamil laborers, urban workers, merchants and middle-class professionals, civil servants and teachers, religious figures, and upper elites with land, capital, or political influence.

allies.zh: 与英国及英联邦国家保持密切关系，同时与印度维持重要地区联系；在联合国与不结盟阵营中寻求广泛合作。
allies.en: It maintained close ties with the United Kingdom and other Commonwealth countries while also preserving important regional relations with India; in the United Nations and the Non-Aligned sphere it sought broad cooperation.

enemies.zh: 1962年无正式国家敌国，但对冷战大国竞争、地区冲突外溢和国内激进化保持警惕。
enemies.en: It had no formal state enemies in 1962, but remained wary of great-power Cold War rivalry, spillover from regional conflicts, and domestic radicalization.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策强调英联邦联系、不结盟倾向、反殖民立场和亚洲-非洲团结。锡兰努力在美苏之间保持独立空间，同时重视与印度、中国、英国及联合国体系的务实往来。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy emphasized Commonwealth ties, a non-aligned inclination, anti-colonial positions, and Afro-Asian solidarity. Ceylon sought room for independence between the United States and the Soviet Union while maintaining pragmatic relations with India, China, Britain, and the UN system.

era.zh: 冷战时代中期的发展中议会国家
era.en: A developing parliamentary state of the mid-Cold War era

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术能力集中于茶叶加工、铁路运输、港口装卸、公共卫生、防疟经验、灌溉工程、广播通信和教育扩张。虽非前沿工业国，但在识字、医疗和行政技术上具有地区竞争力。
keyInnovations.en: Key technological capacities were concentrated in tea processing, rail transport, port handling, public health, anti-malaria experience, irrigation engineering, broadcasting communications, and educational expansion. Though not an advanced industrial power, it was regionally competitive in literacy, healthcare, and administrative technique.

strengths.zh: 优势在于成熟的议会传统、较高识字率和公共卫生水平、强势茶叶出口、重要海上位置以及相对完善的福利国家框架。女性总理的出现也凸显其政治制度的开放性与国际辨识度。
strengths.en: Its strengths lay in a mature parliamentary tradition, relatively high literacy and public health standards, strong tea exports, a significant maritime location, and a comparatively developed welfare-state framework. The emergence of a woman prime minister also underscored the openness and international visibility of its political system.

weaknesses.zh: 弱点包括经济过度依赖少数初级产品出口、工业基础薄弱、外汇与财政压力持续、族群与语言政治矛盾加深，以及安全机构忠诚度在1962年事件后受到质疑。
weaknesses.en: Weaknesses included excessive dependence on a few primary exports, a limited industrial base, persistent foreign-exchange and fiscal pressures, deepening ethnic and language-based political tensions, and doubts about security-service loyalty after the events of 1962.

outlook.zh: 短期内锡兰仍可凭借议会制度、英联邦联系和出口收入维持稳定，但若不能缓解僧伽罗—泰米尔矛盾、提高经济多元化并控制财政失衡，中长期政治与社会紧张可能加剧。
outlook.en: In the short term, Ceylon could remain stable through its parliamentary institutions, Commonwealth links, and export earnings; however, unless it eased Sinhalese-Tamil tensions, broadened economic diversification, and controlled fiscal imbalance, political and social strains were likely to intensify over the medium and long term.

description.zh: 英联邦君主国，由世界首位女总理领导。
description.en: A Commonwealth realm led by the world's first woman prime minister.

governmentForm.zh: 亲西方的中央集权君主立宪体制，实际由沙阿主导的威权君主国
governmentForm.en: A pro-Western centralized constitutional monarchy, in practice an authoritarian monarchy dominated by the Shah

socialStructure.zh: 社会以城市官僚与军官集团、地主与部族精英、巴扎商人、什叶派教士、中产专业阶层、工人和广大农民构成；城乡差距显著，传统结构与现代化力量并存
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of urban bureaucratic and military elites, landlords and tribal notables, bazaar merchants, Shi'a clergy, a growing professional middle class, workers, and a large peasantry; the urban-rural divide was pronounced, and traditional structures coexisted with modernizing forces

rulingClass.zh: 以巴列维王朝、宫廷、军方高级将领、中央官僚、亲王室地主和与国家关系密切的工商精英为核心
rulingClass.en: The ruling class centered on the Pahlavi dynasty, the royal court, senior military officers, central bureaucrats, pro-monarchy landlords, and business elites closely tied to the state

succession.zh: 巴列维王朝世袭继承，王位通常由男性直系后裔继承；1962年法定继承人为皇储礼萨·巴列维
succession.en: Hereditary succession within the Pahlavi dynasty, normally through the male line; in 1962 the legal heir was Crown Prince Reza Pahlavi

structure.zh: 国家形式上设有宪法、内阁、国民议会和参议院，但实际决策高度集中于沙阿、王室幕僚、首相及安全机构。地方行政由省、郡、县三级官僚体系执行，中央控制力较强
structure.en: The state formally possessed a constitution, cabinet, Majlis, and Senate, but real decision-making was highly concentrated in the Shah, the royal court staff, the prime minister, and the security apparatus. Local administration operated through a provincial, county, and district bureaucracy under strong central control

function.zh: 协调沙阿诏令、宫廷事务、政治任命及与内阁和军方的联络
function.en: Coordinated royal decrees, court affairs, political appointments, and liaison with the cabinet and military

function.zh: 管理地方行政、警察、选举安排、省级治理与国内秩序
function.en: Oversaw local administration, police, electoral arrangements, provincial governance, and domestic order

function.zh: 处理对外关系、条约、驻外使团和国际组织事务
function.en: Managed foreign relations, treaties, embassies, and affairs with international organizations

function.zh: 负责预算、税收、国库、海关协同及国家收支管理
function.en: Handled the budget, taxation, treasury, coordination with customs, and management of state revenues and expenditures

function.zh: 管理陆军建制、军需、征兵制度和军事行政
function.en: Managed army organization, logistics, conscription, and military administration

function.zh: 统筹工业、商业、矿业、进出口监管与经济发展政策
function.en: Coordinated industry, commerce, mining, import-export regulation, and economic development policy

function.zh: 管理农业生产、灌溉、土地登记与改革准备工作
function.en: Oversaw agricultural production, irrigation, land registration, and preparations for reform

function.zh: 管理基础与中等教育、课程、教师体系及扫盲工作
function.en: Supervised primary and secondary education, curricula, the teaching system, and literacy work

function.zh: 管理法院体系、法典实施、检察与司法行政
function.en: Administered the court system, implementation of legal codes, prosecution, and judicial administration

function.zh: 管理石油生产、特许、出口收入与同外国石油财团的关系
function.en: Managed oil production, concessions, export revenues, and relations with foreign oil consortiums

localAdmin.zh: 全国划分为多个省，由中央任命省长与地方官员治理；地方议会权力有限，警察、宪兵和行政长官共同执行中央政策
localAdmin.en: The country was divided into provinces governed by centrally appointed governors and officials; local councils had limited power, while police, gendarmerie, and administrative officers enforced central policy

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以大陆法传统、近代成文法和伊朗国家法典为基础，民法受什叶派法学影响；设有世俗法院，宗教法庭在婚姻、继承等领域仍具一定影响
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on continental-style modern codes and Iranian state law, with civil law influenced by Shi'a jurisprudence; secular courts predominated, while religious courts retained influence in matters such as marriage and inheritance

taxationSystem.zh: 国家财政主要依赖石油收入，同时征收关税、消费税、土地与财产税、企业税和所得税；税基较窄，征管能力在农村与传统部门较弱
taxationSystem.en: State finance relied primarily on oil revenues, supplemented by customs duties, excise taxes, land and property taxes, corporate taxes, and income taxes; the tax base was narrow, and collection capacity was weaker in rural and traditional sectors

religion.zh: 国民绝大多数为十二伊玛目派什叶派穆斯林，逊尼派、基督徒、犹太人和琐罗亚斯德教徒构成少数群体；国家认同同时强调伊斯兰传统与前伊斯兰波斯历史
religion.en: The overwhelming majority of the population were Twelver Shi'a Muslims, with Sunni Muslims, Christians, Jews, and Zoroastrians forming minority communities; national identity emphasized both Islamic tradition and pre-Islamic Persian history

philosophy.zh: 官方意识形态强调君主制民族主义、现代化、国家集中化和反共；社会思想则在世俗民族主义、伊斯兰政治思想、自由宪政观念与技术官僚现代化之间竞争
philosophy.en: Official ideology stressed monarchic nationalism, modernization, centralization, and anti-communism; social thought was divided among secular nationalism, Islamic political ideas, liberal constitutionalism, and technocratic modernization

writingSystem.zh: 主要书写系统为波斯语阿拉伯字母书写体，同时政府、军队和学术界在外语教育中广泛使用拉丁字母转写与欧洲语言
writingSystem.en: The principal writing system was the Persian adaptation of the Arabic script, while Latin transliteration and European languages were widely used in government, military, and higher education contexts

culturalAchievements.zh: 伊朗在现代诗歌、电影萌芽、民族音乐、波斯文学研究、考古发掘、大学教育扩张和国家博物馆建设方面表现突出；同时国家大力塑造阿契美尼德、萨珊与现代伊朗相连续的历史叙事
culturalAchievements.en: Iran stood out in modern poetry, the early development of cinema, national music, Persian literary scholarship, archaeology, expansion of university education, and museum building; the state also actively promoted a historical narrative linking Achaemenid, Sasanian, and modern Iran

languageFamily.zh: 官方语言为印欧语系伊朗语族的波斯语；国内并存阿塞拜疆突厥语、库尔德语、阿拉伯语、俾路支语、亚美尼亚语等多种语言
languageFamily.en: The official language was Persian, an Iranian language of the Indo-European family; Azerbaijani Turkic, Kurdish, Arabic, Balochi, Armenian, and other languages were also spoken domestically

gdpDescription.zh: 1962年的伊朗经济属中等发展水平，在中东地区具重要地位。石油出口是决定性支柱，国家财政、外汇和工业化投资高度依赖油收；农业仍吸纳多数人口，但生产率偏低，土地占有不均。国家正处于基础设施建设、进口替代工业化和对外资本技术依赖并行的阶段
gdpDescription.en: In 1962 Iran had a medium-level developing economy of major importance in the Middle East. Oil exports were the decisive pillar, and state finance, foreign exchange, and industrial investment depended heavily on petroleum income; agriculture still employed most of the population, but productivity was low and landholding unequal. The country was in a phase combining infrastructure building, import-substitution industrialization, and dependence on foreign capital and technology

mainIndustries.zh: 石油开采与炼制、纺织、食品加工、水泥、建筑、地毯、运输、轻工业、矿业和初步的机械装配
mainIndustries.en: Oil extraction and refining, textiles, food processing, cement, construction, carpets, transport, light manufacturing, mining, and early mechanical assembly

tradeGoods.zh: 主要出口石油、石油制品、地毯、棉花、皮革、干果和少量矿产品；主要进口机械、车辆、工业设备、化学品、纺织机械、军火和消费品
tradeGoods.en: Main exports included crude oil, petroleum products, carpets, cotton, leather, dried fruits, and small quantities of minerals; major imports were machinery, vehicles, industrial equipment, chemicals, textile machinery, armaments, and consumer goods

householdWealth.zh: 城市中上阶层拥有房产、进口消费品、教育和国家就业机会，生活水平明显高于农村；农村家庭财富多表现为土地使用权、牲畜和家庭劳作能力，整体贫困较深
householdWealth.en: Urban upper and middle strata possessed property, imported consumer goods, education, and access to state employment, enjoying much higher living standards than rural households; rural family wealth was largely expressed in land use rights, livestock, and family labor capacity, with widespread poverty

unit.en: 1962 US dollars per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 国家主导下的混合经济，石油部门受国家严密控制并与国际财团合作，私人商人、巴扎网络与新兴工业资本并存
economicSystem.en: A state-led mixed economy in which the oil sector was tightly controlled by the state in cooperation with international consortiums, while private merchants, bazaar networks, and emerging industrial capital coexisted

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库状况总体稳健，石油收入提供了可观现金流和外汇储备，但预算平衡仍高度依赖国际油价、产量安排和对外融资；大规模现代化计划意味着财政压力正在上升
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was generally sound, with oil revenue providing substantial cash flow and foreign exchange reserves, but fiscal balance remained highly dependent on international oil prices, production arrangements, and foreign financing; large modernization plans were causing mounting budgetary pressure

fiscalPolicy.zh: 政府奉行以石油收入推动现代化和国家建设的扩张性财政政策，优先军备、道路、水利、教育和工业项目，同时试图通过有限税制改革增强非油收入
fiscalPolicy.en: The government pursued an expansionary fiscal policy that used oil revenues to drive modernization and state-building, prioritizing armaments, roads, irrigation, education, and industrial projects, while attempting limited tax reforms to strengthen non-oil revenue

description.zh: 陆军为最大军种，负责国土防御、边境控制、国内镇压和机械化建设，拥有步兵、装甲、炮兵与宪兵部队
description.en: The army was the largest service, responsible for territorial defense, border control, domestic suppression, and mechanization, with infantry, armor, artillery, and gendarmerie elements

description.zh: 空军装备主要来自美国，承担防空、侦察、运输和快速打击任务，是现代化程度较高的军种
description.en: The air force was equipped mainly from the United States and handled air defense, reconnaissance, transport, and rapid strike missions, making it one of the more modern branches

description.zh: 海军规模较小，主要负责波斯湾、霍尔木兹海峡和里海方向的巡逻、护航与港口防卫
description.en: The navy was small and primarily responsible for patrol, escort, and port defense in the Persian Gulf, the Strait of Hormuz, and the Caspian direction

description.zh: 宪兵和内卫部队负责农村治安、交通线安全、反游击和配合情报机构维持政权稳定
description.en: The gendarmerie and internal security forces maintained rural order, protected lines of communication, conducted counterinsurgency, and worked with intelligence organs to preserve regime stability

commanderInChief.zh: 沙阿穆罕默德·礼萨·巴列维

technology.zh: 军队技术处于冷战中等偏上水平，主要依赖美国和西方装备、训练与顾问体系。陆军开始推进机械化，空军使用喷气式飞机，通信、雷达和后勤能力有所改善，但自主军工基础仍有限
technology.en: Military technology stood at a moderately high Cold War level and relied heavily on American and Western equipment, training, and advisory systems. The army was moving toward mechanization, the air force operated jet aircraft, and communications, radar, and logistics were improving, but the indigenous arms industry remained limited

threats.zh: 主要安全压力来自与苏联长期对峙、伊拉克等阿拉伯民族主义政权的不确定性、边境部族与库尔德地区动荡风险，以及国内民族主义、左翼和宗教反对力量
threats.en: The main security pressures came from the long confrontation with the Soviet Union, uncertainty posed by Arab nationalist regimes such as Iraq, risks of unrest in tribal and Kurdish border regions, and domestic nationalist, leftist, and religious opposition

populationDescription.zh: 伊朗1962年人口约2200万，人口增长较快，年龄结构年轻，绝大多数居住在农村或小城镇。民族构成以波斯人为主，另有大量阿塞拜疆人、库尔德人、吉拉克人、马赞德兰人、阿拉伯人、俾路支人、土库曼人和亚美尼亚人等
populationDescription.en: Iran's population in 1962 was about 22 million, growing rapidly and relatively young, with the great majority living in rural areas or small towns. Ethnically, Persians formed the largest group, alongside large communities of Azerbaijanis, Kurds, Gilaks, Mazandaranis, Arabs, Baloch, Turkmen, Armenians, and others

socialClasses.zh: 上层包括王室、宫廷集团、大地主、高级军官和大商人；中层由公务员、教师、专业人士、学生和城市店主构成；下层主要是农民、佃农、城市工人、非正规劳动者与边缘部族人口
socialClasses.en: The upper strata included the royal family, court circles, major landlords, senior officers, and large merchants; the middle strata comprised civil servants, teachers, professionals, students, and urban shopkeepers; the lower strata were mainly peasants, sharecroppers, urban workers, informal laborers, and marginalized tribal populations

allies.zh: 美国、英国、巴基斯坦、土耳其以及在安全合作上与西方阵营关系密切的国家；伊朗也是中央条约组织的重要成员之一
allies.en: The United States, the United Kingdom, Pakistan, Turkey, and other states closely tied to the Western camp in security matters; Iran was also a key member of the Central Treaty Organization

enemies.zh: 无正式全面战争中的主要敌国，但与苏联存在战略猜疑，与纳赛尔主义阿拉伯政权及伊拉克关系紧张；对国内受外部支持的共产主义活动保持高度戒备
enemies.en: There was no principal enemy in a formal all-out war, but Iran maintained strategic suspicion toward the Soviet Union and had tense relations with Nasserist Arab regimes and Iraq; it remained highly vigilant against communist activity supported from abroad

foreignPolicy.zh: 奉行亲西方、反共、维护君主制安全和地区平衡的外交路线，重视同美国的军事与经济联系，同时在中东、波斯湾和南亚寻求区域影响力，并谨慎处理与苏联的边境邻国关系
foreignPolicy.en: Iran pursued a pro-Western, anti-communist foreign policy aimed at protecting the monarchy and preserving regional balance. It valued military and economic ties with the United States, sought influence in the Middle East, the Persian Gulf, and South Asia, and handled its border relationship with the Soviet Union cautiously

era.zh: 冷战时代

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术能力集中在石油勘探与炼制、道路与水坝建设、机场和电信扩张、喷气式航空维护、现代大学教育和国家广播体系。技术进步多依靠进口设备、外国工程顾问和留学生培养
keyInnovations.en: Key technological capacities were concentrated in oil exploration and refining, road and dam construction, airport and telecommunications expansion, jet aircraft maintenance, modern university education, and the national broadcasting system. Technological progress depended heavily on imported equipment, foreign engineering advisers, and overseas-trained students

strengths.zh: 石油资源丰富，财政和外汇相对充裕；国家机器集中，军队和安全机构强大；在美国支持下具备较好的国际融资、军备与技术获取能力；地理位置连接中东、中亚与南亚，战略价值极高
strengths.en: Iran possessed abundant oil resources, relatively strong fiscal and foreign exchange positions, a centralized state apparatus, and powerful armed and security forces; with American backing it enjoyed good access to international finance, armaments, and technology; its location linking the Middle East, Central Asia, and South Asia gave it exceptional strategic value

weaknesses.zh: 经济结构过度依赖石油，农业落后且土地分配不均；政治开放有限，反对派被压制但并未消失；城乡、阶层和族群差距明显，宗教界与巴扎社会对国家现代化路线存在深刻疑虑
weaknesses.en: Its economic structure was overly dependent on oil, agriculture remained backward, and land distribution was highly unequal; political openness was limited, and opposition was suppressed but not eliminated; sharp urban-rural, class, and ethnic disparities persisted, while the clergy and bazaar society harbored deep reservations about the state's modernization course

outlook.zh: 1962年的伊朗表面稳定且发展前景良好，正站在“白色革命”前夜。若改革能够兼顾社会公平与政治整合，国家实力有望显著提升；若现代化以高压方式推进并破坏传统联盟，则中长期社会冲突可能加剧
outlook.en: In 1962 Iran appeared stable and promising, standing on the eve of the White Revolution. If reform could balance social equity with political integration, state power could grow markedly; if modernization were driven coercively and disrupted traditional alliances, however, social conflict could intensify over the longer term

description.zh: 亲西方的君主制国家，即将进入“白色革命”时期。
description.en: A pro-Western monarchy on the eve of the White Revolution.

ruler.zh: 查希尔·沙阿，穆罕默德·达乌德·汗

governmentForm.zh: 中央集权的君主立宪化过渡中的王国，实际上由国王与王族首相主导的王室政体
governmentForm.en: A centralized kingdom in transition toward constitutional monarchy, in practice dominated by the king and a royal prime minister

socialStructure.zh: 社会以部族、地方名望家族、宗教人士、城市官僚与商人、农牧民为核心层级；普什图人政治影响最大，但塔吉克人、哈扎拉人、乌兹别克人及其他族群共同构成国家社会基础
socialStructure.en: Society was structured around tribes, notable local families, religious figures, urban bureaucrats and merchants, and rural farmers and pastoralists; Pashtuns held the greatest political influence, but Tajiks, Hazaras, Uzbeks, and other groups formed the broader social base of the state

rulingClass.zh: 穆萨希班王室、高级军官、中央官僚、地方汗与部族首领、乌理玛精英
rulingClass.en: The Musahiban royal family, senior military officers, central bureaucrats, provincial khans and tribal chiefs, and the ulama elite

succession.zh: 王位由穆萨希班王朝男性宗室世袭继承，重大政务常由王室内部协商决定
succession.en: The throne passed hereditarily through the male line of the Musahiban dynasty, while major affairs of state were often settled through intra-dynastic consultation

structure.zh: 国家由国王统领，内阁由首相主持，中央政府通过各部管理财政、内政、国防、司法、教育、公共工程与外交；省级行政由中央任命的省长与地方官执行，并依赖部族协商与安全机构维持统治
structure.en: The state was headed by the king, with the cabinet led by the prime minister. The central government governed through ministries for finance, interior, defense, justice, education, public works, and foreign affairs; provincial administration was carried out by centrally appointed governors and local officials, relying on both tribal negotiation and security institutions

function.zh: 处理对外关系、国际援助、边界事务与中立平衡外交
function.en: Managed foreign relations, international aid, border affairs, and Afghanistan's balancing policy of neutrality

function.zh: 管理地方行政、警察、安全与省级治理
function.en: Oversaw local administration, police, internal security, and provincial governance

function.zh: 负责军队编制、边境防务、训练与军备采购
function.en: Directed army organization, border defense, training, and arms procurement

function.zh: 征税、预算编制、国库管理与外援资金协调
function.en: Handled taxation, budget preparation, treasury management, and coordination of foreign assistance funds

function.zh: 管理国家法令、法院行政与成文法实施，并与伊斯兰司法传统衔接
function.en: Administered state laws, court administration, and statutory implementation while interfacing with Islamic legal traditions

function.zh: 管理学校、师资培训、课程改革与有限的现代化教育扩展
function.en: Oversaw schools, teacher training, curriculum reform, and the limited expansion of modern education

function.zh: 建设道路、桥梁、政府建筑、水利与城市基础设施
function.en: Built roads, bridges, government buildings, irrigation works, and urban infrastructure

localAdmin.zh: 全国划分为若干省份，由中央任命省长、县长和行政官管理。实际治理在许多地区仍需依赖部族长老会议、地方名望人士与宗教领袖的合作，中央权力在城市和交通干线上较强，在偏远山地与部族地区较弱
localAdmin.en: The country was divided into provinces administered by centrally appointed governors, district heads, and officials. In practice, governance in many areas depended on cooperation with tribal jirgas, local notables, and religious leaders; central authority was stronger in cities and along transport corridors and weaker in remote mountains and tribal regions

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系为伊斯兰法、君主敕令、国家成文法规与习惯法并存。家庭、婚姻和部分民事事务常受伊斯兰法与地方习惯支配，而刑事、行政与财政事务则更多由国家机关处理
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined Islamic law, royal decrees, state statutes, and customary law. Family, marriage, and some civil matters were often governed by Islamic law and local custom, while criminal, administrative, and fiscal matters were handled more directly by state institutions

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以关税、土地税、商业税、国家企业收入和间接税为主；由于经济以自给农业和地方交换为主，直接税征收能力有限，政府财政在很大程度上依赖外援与项目贷款
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied mainly on customs duties, land taxes, commercial levies, state enterprise income, and indirect taxes; because the economy was dominated by subsistence agriculture and local exchange, direct tax collection remained limited, and state finances depended heavily on foreign aid and project loans

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教为国教，绝大多数居民为逊尼派，什叶派主要集中于哈扎拉人与部分城市社群。宗教在社会规范、教育、司法和政治合法性中具有核心地位
religion.en: Islam was the state religion, with the overwhelming majority of the population Sunni and Shi'a communities concentrated mainly among Hazaras and certain urban groups. Religion played a central role in social norms, education, law, and political legitimacy

philosophy.zh: 主导思想为伊斯兰君主合法性、部族协商传统、保守社会伦理与有限现代化观念的结合；国家精英试图在传统、民族统一与技术官僚式发展之间求取平衡
philosophy.en: The dominant outlook blended Islamic monarchical legitimacy, tribal consultative traditions, conservative social ethics, and limited modernization. State elites sought a balance between tradition, national unity, and technocratic development

writingSystem.zh: 主要书写系统为波斯-阿拉伯字母，达里语和普什图语均使用其变体
writingSystem.en: The principal writing system was the Perso-Arabic script, used in adapted forms for both Dari and Pashto

culturalAchievements.zh: 1962年的阿富汗文化成就主要体现在国家教育扩展、喀布尔大学的发展、新闻出版增加、国家广播体系建设，以及传统诗歌、音乐、建筑与宫廷礼仪的延续。考古与历史研究也因国际合作而得到推动，巴米扬、赫拉特与加兹尼等历史遗产持续受到关注
culturalAchievements.en: Afghanistan's cultural achievements in 1962 were seen chiefly in the expansion of state education, the growth of Kabul University, increased publishing, the development of state radio, and the continuation of traditional poetry, music, architecture, and courtly culture. Archaeology and historical scholarship also advanced through international cooperation, and heritage centers such as Bamiyan, Herat, and Ghazni continued to attract attention

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属印欧语系伊朗语族，官方和通用行政语言为达里语与普什图语，另有突厥语及地方语言并存
languageFamily.en: The main languages belonged to the Iranian branch of the Indo-European family; Dari and Pashto served as the principal official and administrative languages, alongside Turkic and other regional languages

gdpDescription.zh: 阿富汗经济规模较小，以低生产率农业、牧业和有限手工业为主，国家工业化水平有限。经济增长在很大程度上依靠苏联、美国及其他外部援助支持的基础设施建设，呈现典型的发展中内陆王国特征
gdpDescription.en: Afghanistan had a small economy centered on low-productivity agriculture, herding, and limited handicrafts, with only modest industrialization. Growth depended heavily on infrastructure programs supported by Soviet, American, and other external aid, giving the kingdom the classic profile of a developing landlocked state

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、畜牧业、地毯编织、羊毛加工、皮革、干果加工、小规模纺织、水泥、建材与国营轻工业
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, livestock raising, carpet weaving, wool processing, leather, dried fruit processing, small-scale textiles, cement, construction materials, and state light industry

tradeGoods.zh: 出口以羊毛、羔皮、地毯、干果、坚果、棉花和少量矿产品为主；进口以机械、车辆、石油制品、纺织品、药品与工业设备为主
tradeGoods.en: Exports consisted mainly of wool, karakul pelts, carpets, dried fruits, nuts, cotton, and limited mineral products; imports included machinery, vehicles, petroleum products, textiles, medicines, and industrial equipment

householdWealth.zh: 大多数家庭财富以土地、牲畜、粮食储备、地毯、首饰和家族网络形式保存，货币储蓄有限，城市商人与官僚阶层拥有较高现金收入和进口消费能力
householdWealth.en: Most household wealth was held in land, livestock, grain stores, carpets, jewelry, and kinship networks, with limited monetary savings; urban merchants and officials possessed greater cash income and access to imported consumer goods

economicSystem.zh: 经济体制为以传统农业和地方市场为基础、由王国政府引导的混合经济；国家在基础设施、银行、部分工业和对外发展项目中作用较大，但私营商贸和乡村自给经济仍占主导
economicSystem.en: The economic system was a state-guided mixed economy based on traditional agriculture and local markets; the government played a substantial role in infrastructure, banking, parts of industry, and externally financed development projects, but private trade and rural subsistence activity still predominated

source.zh: 国外援助转入的预算性收入

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库规模有限，现金储备不足以支持大规模自主工业化或长期军事动员。财政稳定依赖谨慎支出、关税收入与外援项目，预算赤字通常通过外部贷款、延期建设和行政压缩加以平衡
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was limited and lacked the reserves needed for large-scale self-financed industrialization or prolonged military mobilization. Fiscal stability depended on prudent spending, customs income, and foreign aid projects, while budget deficits were often managed through external loans, delayed works, and administrative restraint

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策总体偏保守，重视维持货币稳定、控制经常性支出并将有限资源集中于道路、水利、教育和军政建设；在发展投资方面则积极争取东西方援助而避免对单一大国形成绝对依赖
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was broadly conservative, emphasizing monetary stability, restraint in recurrent spending, and concentration of limited resources on roads, irrigation, education, and state-building; for development investment, the kingdom actively sought aid from both East and West to avoid total dependence on any single power

description.zh: 军队主体，负责边境防御、国内镇压叛乱、山地驻防与国家整合。装备以步兵武器、火炮、少量装甲车辆和运输车辆为主
description.en: The core service, responsible for border defense, internal suppression of unrest, mountain garrison duty, and state integration. Its equipment centered on infantry arms, artillery, a limited number of armored vehicles, and transport vehicles

description.zh: 规模较小，承担运输、侦察、联络和有限的作战任务，机型多依赖外国供应与外国顾问训练
description.en: A small force handling transport, reconnaissance, liaison, and limited combat roles, with aircraft dependent on foreign supply and advisory training

name.zh: 宪兵与准军事边防部队

description.zh: 负责边境巡逻、交通线安全、地方治安与协助省级行政控制，常与内政系统协同运作
description.en: Responsible for border patrol, security of communication lines, local order, and support for provincial administrative control, often operating closely with the interior ministry

commanderInChief.zh: 国王穆罕默德·查希尔·沙阿

technology.zh: 军事技术属20世纪中期水平，以轻武器、牵引火炮、少量装甲车辆、运输机和基础战术航空能力为主。后勤、通信、维修和机械化能力有限，部队作战效能在很大程度上取决于地形熟悉度和地方招募关系
technology.en: Military technology was at a mid-20th-century level, centered on small arms, towed artillery, limited armored vehicles, transport aircraft, and basic tactical air capability. Logistics, communications, maintenance, and mechanization were limited, and combat effectiveness depended heavily on terrain familiarity and local recruitment ties

threats.zh: 主要威胁并非大国直接入侵，而是与巴基斯坦围绕普什图尼斯坦问题的边境紧张、部族地区不稳、走私与地方反抗，以及在冷战环境中被迫卷入大国竞争的风险
threats.en: The main threats were not direct invasion by a superpower but border tensions with Pakistan over the Pashtunistan issue, instability in tribal regions, smuggling and local resistance, and the danger of being drawn into great-power rivalry during the Cold War

populationDescription.zh: 1962年阿富汗人口约1400万，绝大多数居住于农村，分布在山地山谷、灌溉绿洲与北部平原。人口增长较快，但医疗、识字与交通条件仍然落后，区域差异和族群多样性显著
populationDescription.en: Afghanistan's population in 1962 was about 14 million, with the overwhelming majority living in rural areas across mountain valleys, irrigated oases, and the northern plains. Population growth was relatively rapid, but health care, literacy, and transport remained underdeveloped, while regional diversity and ethnic plurality were pronounced

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层大体可分为王室与贵族、部族首领与地方名望家族、宗教学者与教士、城市官僚和商人、工匠与小市民、农民、佃户、牧民与少量产业工人。族群、部族和宗教身份往往比单纯经济阶级更能决定社会地位与政治联系
socialClasses.en: Social strata may be broadly divided into the royal family and aristocracy, tribal chiefs and local notable families, religious scholars and clergy, urban bureaucrats and merchants, artisans and petty townspeople, peasants, tenants, pastoralists, and a small industrial workforce. Ethnic, tribal, and religious identities often mattered more than purely economic class in shaping status and political connection

allies.zh: 阿富汗在1962年没有严格意义上的正式军事同盟，而是与苏联、美国、印度、伊朗、土耳其及部分中立或友好国家维持合作关系；其外交重点是争取多方援助并保持战略自主
allies.en: Afghanistan had no formal military allies in 1962 in the strict sense, but maintained cooperative relations with the Soviet Union, the United States, India, Iran, Turkey, and several neutral or friendly states; its diplomatic priority was to secure assistance from multiple sides while preserving strategic autonomy

enemies.zh: 无公开宣战敌国，但与巴基斯坦因杜兰线与普什图尼斯坦问题关系紧张；同时警惕任何可能削弱王国独立的外部渗透
enemies.en: It had no openly declared enemy states, but relations with Pakistan were tense over the Durand Line and the Pashtunistan issue; the kingdom also remained wary of any external penetration that could weaken its independence

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以积极中立、不结盟倾向和均势外交为核心。阿富汗同时接受苏联和美国援助，在基础设施、军备和教育领域分别与不同大国合作，力图借冷战竞争推动国内建设，同时避免加入任何会损害主权的军事集团
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on active neutrality, a non-aligned tendency, and balance-of-power diplomacy. Afghanistan accepted aid from both the Soviet Union and the United States, cooperating with different great powers in infrastructure, armaments, and education while trying to use Cold War competition to advance domestic development without joining military blocs that would compromise sovereignty

era.zh: 冷战时代中期的发展中国家技术阶段

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术进展并非本土原创发明，而是引进式现代化：公路与隧道建设、机场扩建、无线电通信、现代军训、城市电力、灌溉工程、水泥与轻工业设施，以及高等教育和技术培训体系的初步扩展
keyInnovations.en: The key technological advances were not indigenous inventions but imported modernization: road and tunnel construction, airport expansion, radio communications, modern military training, urban electrification, irrigation works, cement and light industrial facilities, and the early expansion of higher education and technical training

strengths.zh: 王国政权在1962年总体稳定，王室拥有较高合法性，能够在部族、宗教与中央官僚之间维持平衡。地缘位置使其能够从苏美竞争中获取援助，且外交上成功避免卷入正式阵营对抗。社会保守但尚未全面失控，国家建设在教育、道路与行政领域取得一定进展
strengths.en: The kingdom was broadly stable in 1962, and the royal regime retained substantial legitimacy, enabling it to balance tribal, religious, and bureaucratic interests. Its geopolitical position allowed it to extract aid from US-Soviet competition, and diplomatically it succeeded in avoiding formal bloc confrontation. Society was conservative but not yet in systemic breakdown, and state-building had made visible progress in education, roads, and administration

weaknesses.zh: 国家财政脆弱，经济过度依赖农业和外援，工业基础薄弱，交通和识字率不足。中央政府对偏远地区控制有限，政治结构高度依赖王室协调与个别强人，缺乏稳固的大众代表制度。与巴基斯坦的争端也长期消耗外交与财政资源
weaknesses.en: The state was fiscally fragile, overly dependent on agriculture and foreign aid, with a weak industrial base and inadequate transport and literacy. The central government had only limited control over remote regions, and the political structure depended heavily on royal coordination and powerful individuals, lacking durable mass representative institutions. The dispute with Pakistan also consumed diplomatic and financial resources over the long term

outlook.zh: 短期前景谨慎乐观：如果王室继续维持中立、推进温和改革并控制军政开支，阿富汗有望在1960年代继续保持稳定并改善基础设施。但从长期看，若现代化速度快于政治整合、教育扩展激发新精英诉求、或大国竞争与边境争端加剧，现有平衡将面临严重压力
outlook.en: The short-term outlook was cautiously positive: if the monarchy maintained neutrality, pursued moderate reform, and controlled military and administrative spending, Afghanistan could remain stable and continue improving infrastructure through the 1960s. In the longer term, however, if modernization outpaced political integration, if educational expansion stimulated new elite demands, or if great-power rivalry and border disputes intensified, the existing balance would come under severe strain

description.zh: 在苏美之间维持平衡的内陆王国。
description.en: An inland kingdom balancing between the Soviet Union and the United States.

ruler.zh: 阿卜杜勒-卡里姆·卡西姆

rulerTitle.zh: 总理兼武装部队总司令
rulerTitle.en: Prime Minister and Commander-in-Chief of the Armed Forces

governmentForm.zh: 1958年革命后建立的军事主导共和制，名义上为共和国，实际上由总理、军官集团与革命机构主导
governmentForm.en: A military-dominated republic established after the 1958 revolution; formally republican but in practice led by the prime minister, officer corps, and revolutionary institutions

socialStructure.zh: 社会由城市官僚与军官阶层、逊尼派与什叶派阿拉伯农民、库尔德部族与城镇居民、商人阶层及新兴工人群体组成，地区、宗派与民族差异显著
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of urban bureaucrats and officers, Sunni and Shi'i Arab peasants, Kurdish tribal and town populations, merchant groups, and a growing working class, with strong regional, sectarian, and ethnic divisions

rulingClass.zh: 以自由军官、共和国军政精英、高级官僚和与政权合作的技术官僚为核心
rulingClass.en: The ruling class centered on Free Officers, republican military-political elites, senior bureaucrats, and technocrats aligned with the regime

succession.zh: 非世袭，通过政变、军队支持与革命合法性决定领导权，缺乏稳定宪政继承机制
succession.en: Non-hereditary; leadership depended on coups, military backing, and revolutionary legitimacy, with no stable constitutional mechanism of succession

structure.zh: 中央政府由总理办公室、内阁、革命后重组的各部会及军方安全体系构成；总统职位形式上存在但实际权力有限，1962年国家决策主要集中于卡西姆本人及其亲信圈
structure.en: The central government consisted of the prime minister's office, cabinet ministries reorganized after the revolution, and the military-security apparatus; the presidency formally existed but held limited real power, while decision-making in 1962 was concentrated around Qasim and his close circle

function.zh: 统筹国家政策、监督各部并直接处理安全与政治事务
function.en: Coordinated state policy, supervised ministries, and directly handled security and political affairs

function.zh: 管理陆空军、军事预算、后勤与国内平叛行动
function.en: Managed the army and air force, military budgeting, logistics, and domestic counterinsurgency operations

function.zh: 负责警察、国内治安、边境管理和情报监控
function.en: Handled police, internal security, border administration, and intelligence surveillance

function.zh: 征税、编制预算、管理国库和金融行政
function.en: Collected taxes, prepared budgets, managed the treasury, and oversaw financial administration

name.zh: 石油部与国家石油管理机构
name.en: Petroleum Ministry and State Oil Administration

function.zh: 监督石油政策、特许权谈判、出口收入与国有化准备工作
function.en: Oversaw petroleum policy, concession negotiations, export revenues, and preparations for greater state control

function.zh: 执行土地改革、拆解大地产并安置农民
function.en: Implemented land reform, broke up large estates, and settled peasant beneficiaries

function.zh: 管理学校体系、扫盲、师资培训和课程改革
function.en: Managed the school system, literacy campaigns, teacher training, and curriculum reform

localAdmin.zh: 全国划分为省级行政区，由中央任命的省长和地方行政官管理；地方自治有限，军方与警察对省份政治影响很大，北部库尔德地区常处于半军事化管理状态
localAdmin.en: The country was divided into provinces administered by centrally appointed governors and local officials; local autonomy was limited, and military and police influence over provincial politics was strong, especially in the northern Kurdish areas which were often under semi-militarized administration

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系混合奥斯曼遗产、英国托管时期立法、大陆法传统与伊斯兰个人身份法；革命法令和特别安全措施在政治案件中具有优先地位
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined Ottoman legacies, British Mandate-era legislation, continental civil law influences, and Islamic personal status law; revolutionary decrees and special security measures took precedence in political cases

taxationSystem.zh: 国家财政主要依赖石油特许权和出口收入，辅以关税、消费税、土地税、所得税和国有企业收益；直接税征收能力有限，农村税收执行不均
taxationSystem.en: State finance depended primarily on oil concession and export revenues, supplemented by customs duties, excise taxes, land taxes, income taxes, and public enterprise income; direct tax collection remained limited and uneven in rural areas

religion.zh: 以伊斯兰教为主，什叶派人口占多数，逊尼派在政治与军队中影响较大；北部有库尔德逊尼派，另有基督徒、雅兹迪人和其他少数宗教群体
religion.en: Islam predominated, with a Shi'i majority in the population but strong Sunni influence in politics and the military; the north included Sunni Kurds, while Christians, Yazidis, and other minorities were also present

philosophy.zh: 国家意识形态混合伊拉克民族主义、阿拉伯民族主义、社会改革思想、有限社会主义及反帝国主义；同时受到共产主义、纳赛尔主义与传统宗教保守主义竞争影响
philosophy.en: The state's ideological atmosphere mixed Iraqi nationalism, Arab nationalism, social reformism, limited socialism, and anti-imperialism, while also being contested by communism, Nasserism, and traditional religious conservatism

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用阿拉伯字母书写阿拉伯语；库尔德语在北部也被使用，通常以阿拉伯字母形式书写
writingSystem.en: Arabic was written in the Arabic script as the principal writing system; Kurdish was also used in the north, commonly written in adapted Arabic script

culturalAchievements.zh: 巴格达继续作为阿拉伯文化与出版中心之一，广播、报刊和诗歌活跃；革命后国家推动教育扩展、妇女地位改革和大众文化传播，同时现代艺术与民族音乐并存
culturalAchievements.en: Baghdad remained an important Arab center of culture and publishing, with active radio, newspapers, and poetry; after the revolution the state promoted educational expansion, reforms in women's status, and mass culture, while modern art coexisted with national and folk music

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属闪米特语系的阿拉伯语；库尔德语属印欧语系伊朗语支
languageFamily.en: The principal language, Arabic, belonged to the Semitic family; Kurdish belonged to the Iranian branch of the Indo-European family

gdpDescription.zh: 1962年的伊拉克经济属于中低收入石油输出经济，石油部门产值高但对就业拉动有限，农村人口仍占多数，国家正尝试通过土地改革、基础设施和工业化计划减少对单一资源的依赖
gdpDescription.en: In 1962 Iraq was a lower-middle-income oil-exporting economy, with a highly productive petroleum sector that generated revenue but limited employment; the rural majority remained large, and the state was trying to reduce dependence on a single resource through land reform, infrastructure, and industrialization plans

mainIndustries.zh: 石油开采与出口、炼油、农业、畜牧业、纺织、食品加工、建筑材料、河运与基础公共工程
mainIndustries.en: Oil extraction and export, refining, agriculture, livestock, textiles, food processing, construction materials, river transport, and basic public works

tradeGoods.zh: 出口以原油、石油制品、枣椰、羊毛、皮革为主；进口机械、车辆、工业设备、纺织品、药品、消费品和军需物资
tradeGoods.en: Exports were led by crude oil, petroleum products, dates, wool, and leather; imports included machinery, vehicles, industrial equipment, textiles, pharmaceuticals, consumer goods, and military supplies

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异极大，城市地主、商人与高级军政官员积累了较多资产，而大量农民和城市贫民仍接近生计边缘；土地改革开始削弱旧地主阶层，但尚未完全改变分配格局
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal: urban landlords, merchants, and senior military-political officials held substantial assets, while many peasants and urban poor lived near subsistence; land reform had begun to weaken the old landed elite but had not yet transformed distribution

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济，石油收入支撑国家投资，私营商业与农业仍占重要地位，政府扩大对银行、工业项目和发展规划的干预
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy in which oil revenues supported state investment, while private commerce and agriculture remained important; the government increased intervention in banking, industrial projects, and development planning

source.zh: 石油收入与特许权付款
土地税与农业相关征收

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库状况较为稳健，得益于石油收入和此前积累，但受军事开支、政权维稳成本和发展支出压力影响，财政缓冲正在被逐步消耗
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury remained relatively solid thanks to oil income and earlier accumulations, but fiscal buffers were being gradually drawn down by military spending, regime-security costs, and development expenditures

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏扩张，利用石油收入资助公共工程、社会改革和军队，同时在政治动荡背景下接受适度赤字
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was expansionary, using oil revenues to fund public works, social reform, and the armed forces, while tolerating moderate deficits amid political instability

description.zh: 军队核心力量，负责边境防御、首都控制与北部对库尔德武装作战，拥有步兵、装甲和炮兵部队
description.en: The core military force, responsible for border defense, control of the capital, and operations against Kurdish forces in the north, with infantry, armor, and artillery units

description.zh: 规模有限但政治重要，装备英制与苏制飞机，用于侦察、运输和对叛乱地区实施空中支援
description.en: Limited in size but politically important, equipped with British and Soviet aircraft for reconnaissance, transport, and air support in rebel areas

name.zh: 共和国警察与宪兵部队

description.zh: 负责国内治安、镇压骚乱、保护交通线和协助军队执行反叛乱任务
description.en: Responsible for internal security, riot suppression, protection of lines of communication, and assisting the army in counterinsurgency

commanderInChief.zh: 阿卜杜勒-卡里姆·卡西姆

technology.zh: 处于20世纪中期区域水平，军队使用二战后常规武器、装甲车辆、火炮、运输机和少量喷气式战机；后勤、通信和联合作战能力有限
technology.en: At a mid-20th-century regional level, the military used postwar conventional weapons, armored vehicles, artillery, transport aircraft, and a small number of jet fighters; logistics, communications, and joint operations capability were limited

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自国内政变阴谋、阿拉伯民族主义者与共产党之间的政治斗争，以及北部穆斯塔法·巴尔扎尼领导下的库尔德武装冲突；外部则面临与伊朗、土耳其边境紧张和阿以地区长期对抗环境
threats.en: The main threats came from internal coup plotting, political struggle between Arab nationalists and communists, and armed conflict in the north under Mustafa Barzani's Kurdish movement; externally Iraq also faced tensions along the Iranian and Turkish frontiers and the broader Arab-Israeli confrontation

populationDescription.zh: 人口约750万，集中于底格里斯河与幼发拉底河流域以及北部山地和城市中心；人口增长较快，农村人口仍占多数，但巴格达等城市吸引大量迁入
populationDescription.en: The population was about 7.5 million, concentrated in the Tigris-Euphrates basin, northern highlands, and urban centers; growth was rapid, the rural majority remained large, but cities such as Baghdad attracted heavy migration

socialClasses.zh: 主要包括大地主残余、部族首领、城市商人、中小公务员、军官、宗教人士、工人、手工业者和广大农民；同时存在阿拉伯、库尔德、土库曼、亚述等民族差异，以及逊尼、什叶等宗派分层
socialClasses.en: Major social classes included remnants of the large landowning elite, tribal leaders, urban merchants, lower and middle civil servants, officers, religious notables, workers, artisans, and the broad peasantry; Arab, Kurdish, Turkmen, and Assyrian ethnic divisions intersected with Sunni and Shi'i sectarian layers

allies.zh: 伊拉克在1962年奉行不稳定的不结盟和机会主义外交，与苏联保持重要军贸和政治联系，也与部分社会主义国家和阿拉伯共和国维持合作；但并无绝对可靠盟友
allies.en: In 1962 Iraq pursued an unstable non-aligned and opportunistic diplomacy, maintaining important military and political ties with the Soviet Union as well as cooperation with some socialist states and Arab republics, but it had no absolutely reliable allies

enemies.zh: 以色列被视为长期敌对国家；与约旦和纳赛尔派阿拉伯联合共和国关系紧张，西方列强对卡西姆政权持怀疑态度，国内也指责伊朗在库尔德问题上施加影响
enemies.en: Israel was regarded as a long-term hostile state; relations with Jordan and the Nasserist United Arab Republic were tense, Western powers viewed the Qasim regime with suspicion, and Iran was accused domestically of exerting influence over the Kurdish issue

foreignPolicy.zh: 卡西姆政府试图在冷战两极之间保持自主，退出亲西方联盟体系后强调伊拉克主权、反帝与独立发展，同时利用苏联援助平衡西方压力，并在阿拉伯世界中坚持伊拉克优先而非完全服从泛阿拉伯统一路线
foreignPolicy.en: Qasim's government sought autonomy between the Cold War blocs; after leaving the pro-Western alliance system it emphasized Iraqi sovereignty, anti-imperialism, and independent development, while using Soviet assistance to balance Western pressure and insisting on an Iraq-first line rather than full submission to pan-Arab unionism

era.zh: 冷战时代

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术能力集中在石油开采、输油管道、炼油、灌溉、水利、无线电广播、道路桥梁建设和喷气式军机维护；高端工业技术仍依赖进口专家、外国设备和外部培训
keyInnovations.en: Key technological capacities centered on oil extraction, pipelines, refining, irrigation, water control, radio broadcasting, road and bridge construction, and maintenance of jet aircraft; advanced industrial technology still depended on imported expertise, foreign equipment, and external training

strengths.zh: 拥有丰富石油资源、战略地理位置、较充足财政收入和不断扩大的国家机器；革命后政权具备一定社会动员能力，并试图推进土地改革、教育扩展和独立外交
strengths.en: Iraq possessed abundant oil resources, a strategic location, relatively strong fiscal income, and an expanding state apparatus; the post-revolutionary regime retained some capacity for social mobilization and attempted land reform, educational expansion, and independent diplomacy

weaknesses.zh: 政治高度不稳定，军队深陷派系斗争，政府合法性脆弱；经济过度依赖石油，农村贫困严重，行政能力不均，库尔德问题和阿拉伯民族主义分裂持续削弱国家整合
weaknesses.en: Politics were highly unstable, the military was mired in factional struggle, and governmental legitimacy was fragile; the economy depended too heavily on oil, rural poverty remained severe, administrative capacity was uneven, and the Kurdish question together with divisions over Arab nationalism continued to weaken national integration

outlook.zh: 1962年的伊拉克前景充满危险而未定：若能稳定军政关系、缓和库尔德冲突并有效利用石油财富，国家有望实现快速现代化；但更可能的短期走势是政变、清洗与内战式冲突继续升级
outlook.en: Iraq's outlook in 1962 was dangerous and uncertain: if it could stabilize civil-military relations, ease the Kurdish conflict, and use oil wealth effectively, rapid modernization was possible; in the short term, however, coups, purges, and escalating internal conflict were the more likely trajectory

description.zh: 1958年革命后的阿拉伯共和国，内部政争与库尔德问题突出。
description.en: An Arab republic born of the 1958 revolution, marked by internal struggle and the Kurdish question.

governmentForm.zh: 1961年宪法下的议会民主共和国，设总统、总理和单院国民议会，并由军方通过国家安全机制保持间接影响
governmentForm.en: A parliamentary democratic republic under the 1961 Constitution, with a president, prime minister, and unicameral national assembly, while the military retained indirect influence through national security mechanisms

socialStructure.zh: 社会以城乡分层并存，国家官僚、军官团、城市专业中产阶层、工商资产阶级、工人、农民与地方宗族网络共同构成社会主体；西部和大城市较为城市化，安纳托利亚内地与东南部更具传统乡村特征
socialStructure.en: Society combined urban and rural stratification, with state bureaucrats, the officer corps, an urban professional middle class, commercial and industrial bourgeoisie, workers, peasants, and local kinship networks as its main components; the west and major cities were more urbanized, while central Anatolia and the southeast remained more traditional and rural

rulingClass.zh: 以军政官僚精英、共和人民党与正义党等主要政党领导层、高级法官以及工商界领袖构成的凯末尔主义国家精英为主
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted chiefly of the Kemalist state elite: military-bureaucratic leaders, the upper leadership of major parties such as the Republican People's Party and Justice Party, senior judges, and business elites

succession.zh: 总统由大国民议会依宪法选举产生，总理由总统任命并通常由议会多数派领袖出任；政权更替以选举和议会程序为原则，但军方保留非常时期干预能力
succession.en: The president was elected by the Grand National Assembly under the constitution, while the prime minister was appointed by the president and usually came from the parliamentary majority; political succession was formally based on elections and parliamentary procedure, though the military retained the capacity to intervene in exceptional circumstances

structure.zh: 中央政府由总统、总理、部长会议、大国民议会、独立司法机构和新设宪法法院构成；1961年后制度更强调权力制衡、基本权利和法治，同时国家安全委员会成为军民协调的重要平台
structure.en: The central government consisted of the president, prime minister, council of ministers, Grand National Assembly, an independent judiciary, and the newly established Constitutional Court; after 1961 the system placed greater emphasis on checks and balances, fundamental rights, and rule of law, while the National Security Council became an important platform for civil-military coordination

function.zh: 协调内阁政策、行政指挥、立法议程与跨部门事务
function.en: Coordinated cabinet policy, executive direction, the legislative agenda, and interministerial affairs

function.zh: 负责地方行政、治安、警察、户籍和省级监督
function.en: Handled local administration, public order, police, civil registration, and provincial oversight

function.zh: 管理外交关系、驻外使团、条约和多边组织事务，特别是北约与西方联盟协调
function.en: Managed foreign relations, overseas missions, treaties, and multilateral affairs, especially coordination with NATO and the Western alliance

function.zh: 征税、预算编制、国库管理、海关与财政监督
function.en: Oversaw taxation, budgeting, treasury administration, customs, and fiscal supervision

function.zh: 管理国防预算、后勤、动员和军队行政事务
function.en: Managed defense budgeting, logistics, mobilization, and military administrative affairs

function.zh: 负责基础教育、中等教育、教师体系和国家世俗教育政策
function.en: Supervised primary and secondary education, the teaching system, and the state's secular education policy

function.zh: 建设道路、桥梁、政府建筑、水利和基础设施
function.en: Built roads, bridges, government buildings, waterworks, and infrastructure

function.zh: 负责农业推广、作物管理、畜牧、农村发展和粮食政策
function.en: Handled agricultural extension, crop management, livestock, rural development, and food policy

localAdmin.zh: 全国划分为省、县、乡镇与村庄层级，由中央任命省长代表国家执行行政监督，地方选举机构在市政与部分基层事务中发挥作用，但中央集权色彩仍然较强
localAdmin.en: The country was divided into provinces, districts, townships, and villages; centrally appointed governors represented the state in administrative supervision, while elected local bodies played roles in municipal and some grassroots affairs, though the system remained strongly centralized

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以大陆法传统为基础，继承共和国时期世俗法典改革，民法、刑法和商法多受瑞士、意大利和德国法影响；1961年宪法强化司法独立、基本权利与宪法审查
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on the civil law tradition and on secular codification reforms of the republican era; civil, criminal, and commercial law were heavily influenced by Swiss, Italian, and German models, while the 1961 Constitution strengthened judicial independence, fundamental rights, and constitutional review

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以间接税、关税、营业与消费税、所得税和国有经济收益为主；征收能力在大城市与沿海地区较强，在农村和非正规经济领域较弱
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied chiefly on indirect taxes, customs duties, business and consumption taxes, income taxes, and revenues from state economic enterprises; collection capacity was stronger in major cities and coastal regions and weaker in rural and informal sectors

religion.zh: 居民绝大多数为逊尼派穆斯林，另有阿列维社群、少量什叶派、基督徒和犹太人；国家正式实行世俗主义，宗教事务由国家宗教事务局加以管理
religion.en: The overwhelming majority of the population was Sunni Muslim, with Alevi communities, small Shi'a groups, Christians, and Jews also present; the state was formally secular, and religious affairs were administered through the Directorate of Religious Affairs

philosophy.zh: 官方政治文化以凯末尔主义为核心，强调共和主义、民族主义、世俗主义、国家主义、民众主义与改革主义；社会层面则并存伊斯兰伦理、乡土保守观念和现代民族国家认同
