function.zh: 协调国王诏令、政治任命与国家重大决策。
function.en: Coordinated royal decrees, political appointments, and major state decisions.

function.zh: 负责地方行政、治安、边境管理与中央命令落实。
function.en: Handled local administration, public order, border management, and implementation of central directives.

function.zh: 征税、预算编制、外援管理与财政监督。
function.en: Managed taxation, budgeting, foreign aid, and fiscal oversight.

function.zh: 负责道路、桥梁、机场及对外援建项目。
function.en: Oversaw roads, bridges, airfields, and externally funded infrastructure projects.

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理依村、镇、县级潘查亚特逐级上达中央，但实际控制力在偏远山区仍有限。地方官员往往同时依赖传统领袖、地方法官和军警力量。
localAdmin.en: Local administration ran through village, town, and district Panchayat levels up to the center, though actual state reach remained limited in remote hill areas. Local officials often relied on traditional leaders, magistrates, and security forces.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以成文法、王令及既有印度教社会规范相结合为特征。国家法院存在，但在乡村地区习惯法和地方调解仍十分常见。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined codified law, royal decrees, and established Hindu social norms. State courts existed, but customary law and local mediation remained very common in rural areas.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收主要来自土地税、关税、消费税和国有收入。征收能力较弱，偏远地区实物征收和不完全登记现象仍然存在。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation came mainly from land revenue, customs duties, excises, and state income. Collection capacity was weak, and in remote areas in-kind payment and incomplete registration still persisted.

religion.zh: 印度教

culturalAchievements.zh: 加德满都谷地的寺庙建筑、木雕与宗教节庆在南亚山地文化中极具特色。1960年代国家也开始以教育和广播推动统一的尼泊尔民族认同。
culturalAchievements.en: The temple architecture, wood carving, and religious festivals of the Kathmandu Valley were distinctive within Himalayan South Asia. In the 1960s, the state also began using education and radio to promote a more unified Nepali national identity.

languageFamily.zh: 主要官方语言尼泊尔语属印欧语系印度-雅利安语支，境内并存多种汉藏语系与其他地方语言。
languageFamily.en: The main official language, Nepali, belonged to the Indo-European Indo-Aryan branch, while many Sino-Tibetan and other local languages were also spoken.

philosophy.zh: 以印度教王权观、种姓秩序与佛教传统并存为核心，同时强调国王作为国家统一象征。
philosophy.en: Centered on Hindu ideas of kingship and caste order alongside Buddhist traditions, while emphasizing the king as the symbol of national unity.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用尼泊尔语的天城文书写系统。
writingSystem.en: Primarily used the Devanagari script for Nepali.

gdpDescription.zh: 尼泊尔经济以自给农业为主，市场整合程度低，现代工业规模极小。外援与过境贸易对财政和基础设施建设的重要性正在上升。
gdpDescription.en: Nepal’s economy was dominated by subsistence agriculture, with low market integration and only a tiny modern industrial sector. Foreign aid and transit trade were becoming increasingly important for public finance and infrastructure building.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、林业、手工业、黄麻加工、基础建筑业
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, forestry, handicrafts, jute processing, basic construction

tradeGoods.zh: 大米、黄麻、木材、酥油、药材、羊毛制品、进口纺织品与日用品
tradeGoods.en: Rice, jute, timber, ghee, medicinal herbs, wool goods, and imported textiles and consumer goods

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富主要以土地、牲畜、粮食储备和贵金属饰物形式保存，现金持有量普遍偏低。城市商人和官僚家庭的货币资产明显高于农村人口。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was held mainly in land, livestock, grain stores, and precious-metal ornaments, while cash holdings were generally low. Urban merchant and bureaucratic households had far greater monetary assets than rural families.

economicSystem.zh: 以传统农业和有限国家主导开发相结合的混合型低收入经济。
economicSystem.en: A low-income mixed economy combining traditional agriculture with limited state-led development.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库规模有限，流动性很大程度依赖关税收入时点与外援拨付。财政缓冲能力较弱。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was modest in size, and liquidity depended heavily on the timing of customs receipts and foreign aid disbursements. Fiscal buffering capacity was weak.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以维持王权统治、扩张行政控制和建设基础设施为主，赤字通常依赖外援与贷款弥补。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy focused on sustaining royal rule, extending administrative control, and building infrastructure, with deficits usually covered by foreign aid and borrowing.

description.zh: 军队核心力量，负责王室安全、国内秩序和边境驻防。
description.en: The core military force, responsible for royal security, domestic order, and border deployment.

description.zh: 用于内卫、巡逻和对偏远地区的治安控制。
description.en: Used for internal security, patrol duties, and maintaining control in remote areas.

description.zh: 规模极小，主要承担运输、联络和医疗后送任务。
description.en: Very small in size, mainly handling transport, liaison, and medical evacuation.

commanderInChief.zh: 马亨德拉国王

technology.zh: 装备以轻武器、山地步兵装备和少量运输机为主，整体训练适应山地环境但缺乏重型装备。
technology.en: Equipment centered on small arms, mountain infantry gear, and a few transport aircraft; training suited the Himalayan environment but heavy equipment was scarce.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自边境控制薄弱、内部反对派活动及中印之间地缘紧张对尼泊尔安全环境的外溢影响。
threats.en: Main threats came from weak border control, domestic opposition activity, and spillover from Sino-Indian geopolitical tensions affecting Nepal’s security environment.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约一千万，绝大多数居住在农村并依赖农业。族群、语言和地理差异显著，国家整合仍在推进。
populationDescription.en: The population was about ten million, with the overwhelming majority living in rural areas and depending on agriculture. Ethnic, linguistic, and geographic diversity was substantial, and national integration remained a work in progress.

socialClasses.zh: 王室与贵族、高种姓官僚与地主、城市商人、普通农民、少数民族社区与低种姓劳动者。
socialClasses.en: Royalty and aristocrats, high-caste officials and landlords, urban merchants, ordinary peasants, ethnic minority communities, and lower-caste laborers.

allies.zh: 保持对印度友好并接受印度援助，同时谨慎发展与中国的关系；也接受美国和其他援助国支持。
allies.en: Maintained friendly ties with India and received Indian aid, while cautiously developing relations with China; it also accepted support from the United States and other aid donors.

enemies.zh: 无明确国家级正式敌国，但对外部干涉和国内流亡反对派保持警惕。
enemies.en: Had no clear formal state enemy, but remained wary of foreign interference and exiled domestic opposition groups.

foreignPolicy.zh: 奉行在印度与中国之间平衡的谨慎中立政策，核心目标是维护主权、争取援助并避免被卷入大国冲突。
foreignPolicy.en: Pursued a cautious balancing neutrality between India and China, aiming to preserve sovereignty, attract aid, and avoid entanglement in great-power conflict.

era.zh: 20世纪中期发展中国家早期现代化阶段
era.en: Mid-20th-century early modernization stage in a developing country

keyInnovations.zh: 重点技术变化集中在公路修建、无线电通信、基础航空运输和对外援助带来的工程设备引进。
keyInnovations.en: Key technological changes centered on road construction, radio communications, basic air transport, and the import of engineering equipment through foreign aid.

strengths.zh: 王权集中、山地防御条件强、地缘位置重要且能从多方获得援助。
strengths.en: Strong centralized monarchy, formidable mountain geography, strategic location, and the ability to obtain aid from multiple sides.

weaknesses.zh: 经济极度落后、交通薄弱、行政渗透有限，社会分层和地区差异明显。
weaknesses.en: Extremely underdeveloped economy, weak transport links, limited administrative reach, and pronounced social and regional divisions.

outlook.zh: 短期内政权稳定性较高，但长期发展将取决于基础设施建设、教育扩展以及在中印之间维持平衡的能力。
outlook.en: Regime stability was relatively high in the short term, but long-term development depended on infrastructure building, educational expansion, and the ability to maintain balance between India and China.

description.zh: 1962年的尼泊尔是在马亨德拉国王领导下以王权和潘查亚特体制推进有限现代化的喜马拉雅王国。
description.en: In 1962, Nepal was a Himalayan kingdom under King Mahendra, pursuing limited modernization through royal power and the Panchayat system.

governmentForm.zh: 1962年的芬兰是议会民主共和国，由总统在外交与安全事务中拥有显著权力。
governmentForm.en: In 1962, Finland was a parliamentary democratic republic in which the president exercised significant authority in foreign and security affairs.

socialStructure.zh: 芬兰社会以受教育程度较高的农民、工人、中产专业阶层和城市雇员为主体，阶级差异较西欧大国相对温和。战后工业化和福利国家建设正在改变传统农村社会结构。
socialStructure.en: Finnish society was composed mainly of relatively well-educated farmers, workers, middle-class professionals, and urban employees, with class differences milder than in many larger Western European states. Postwar industrialization and welfare-state building were reshaping the older rural social order.

rulingClass.zh: 统治精英由总统、议会党派领袖、高级公务员、工业资本与工会高层共同构成。外交和安全政策上，总统及其亲信圈影响尤其突出。
rulingClass.en: The ruling elite consisted of the president, party leaders in parliament, senior civil servants, industrial capital, and top labor-union figures. In foreign and security policy, the president and his close circle were especially influential.

succession.zh: 总统依宪法由选举团制度产生，政府需维持议会支持。国家元首和行政首脑的更替通过宪政程序和平完成。
succession.en: The president was chosen under a constitutional electoral-college system, and governments required parliamentary support. Transitions of the head of state and executive leadership occurred through peaceful constitutional procedures.

structure.zh: 芬兰实行议会制与强总统制并存的共和国体制，总统在对苏关系和大战略上具有核心影响。内阁由总理领导并对议会负责，中央官僚体系运作高效。
structure.en: Finland operated a republic combining parliamentarism with a strong presidency, with the president playing a central role in relations with the Soviet Union and grand strategy. The cabinet was led by the prime minister and responsible to parliament, while the central bureaucracy functioned efficiently.

function.zh: 处理对苏关系、北欧合作、贸易外交与中立政策执行。
function.en: Managed relations with the Soviet Union, Nordic cooperation, trade diplomacy, and implementation of neutrality policy.

function.zh: 负责编制预算、税收政策、国家债务和公共财政协调。
function.en: Handled budget preparation, tax policy, public debt, and overall fiscal coordination.

function.zh: 促进工业发展、能源、出口竞争力和企业监管。
function.en: Promoted industrial development, energy policy, export competitiveness, and enterprise regulation.

function.zh: 监督征兵体制、国土防御和战时动员准备。
function.en: Oversaw conscription, territorial defense, and wartime mobilization readiness.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政以市镇自治为基础，地方政府负责教育、卫生、基础设施和社会服务的相当部分。中央与地方财政关系制度化程度较高。
localAdmin.en: Local administration rested on municipal self-government, with local authorities responsible for much of education, health care, infrastructure, and social services. Fiscal relations between the center and local governments were comparatively well institutionalized.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系属于北欧大陆法传统，司法独立程度较高。行政运作强调法治、程序和较低腐败。
legalSystem.en: The legal system belonged to the Nordic civil-law tradition, with a relatively high degree of judicial independence. Administration emphasized rule of law, procedure, and low corruption.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以所得税、消费税、关税及企业税为主，能够为不断扩展的社会服务提供资金。税收征管能力强，覆盖全国。
taxationSystem.en: The tax system relied on income taxes, excises, customs duties, and corporate taxes, providing funding for expanding social services. Tax administration was strong and nationwide in reach.

religion.zh: 基督教路德宗

culturalAchievements.zh: 芬兰在建筑、设计、音乐和基础教育方面已形成鲜明国际形象，战后现代主义设计尤为突出。文学、公共图书馆和合唱传统也具有较强社会影响力。
culturalAchievements.en: Finland had already developed a distinct international profile in architecture, design, music, and basic education, with postwar modernist design especially notable. Literature, public libraries, and choral traditions also had strong social influence.

languageFamily.zh: 芬兰语属乌拉尔语系芬兰-乌戈尔语族，瑞典语属印欧语系日耳曼语族。
languageFamily.en: Finnish belongs to the Uralic Finnic branch, while Swedish belongs to the Indo-European Germanic branch.

philosophy.zh: 强调路德宗伦理、民族独立、社会团结、教育普及与务实中立。
philosophy.en: Emphasized Lutheran ethics, national independence, social cohesion, mass education, and pragmatic neutrality.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用拉丁字母书写芬兰语和瑞典语。
writingSystem.en: Used the Latin alphabet primarily for Finnish and Swedish.

gdpDescription.zh: 芬兰是一个已完成较深度工业化的中等规模北欧经济体，出口导向明显。木材、纸浆、造船、金属加工与工程制造构成增长核心，同时保持与西方和苏联的双向贸易。
gdpDescription.en: Finland was a moderately sized Nordic economy with substantial industrialization and a clear export orientation. Timber, pulp, shipbuilding, metalworking, and engineering manufacturing formed the core of growth, while the country maintained two-way trade with both the West and the Soviet Union.

mainIndustries.zh: 林业、纸浆造纸、金属加工、机械制造、造船、电力与化工
mainIndustries.en: Forestry, pulp and paper, metalworking, machinery, shipbuilding, power, and chemicals

tradeGoods.zh: 纸张、纸浆、木材制品、船舶、机械、金属品、燃料与粮食进口
tradeGoods.en: Paper, pulp, timber products, ships, machinery, metal goods, and imported fuel and foodstuffs

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富主要体现为自有住房、储蓄存款、农地和耐用消费品拥有率上升。城乡差距仍存在，但整体生活水平在持续改善。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was reflected in home ownership, savings deposits, farmland, and rising possession of durable consumer goods. Urban-rural gaps remained, but overall living standards were improving steadily.

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济为基础、辅以国家协调和社会伙伴协商的混合经济。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy based on markets, supplemented by state coordination and social-partner bargaining.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库状况总体稳健，能够支撑季节性财政周转和有限逆周期支出。国家金融信誉较高。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury position was generally sound, able to support seasonal fiscal operations and limited countercyclical spending. State financial credibility was comparatively high.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策兼顾工业竞争力、地区发展和福利支出扩展，通常保持审慎但并不排斥温和赤字。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy balanced industrial competitiveness, regional development, and the expansion of welfare spending, usually remaining prudent while not excluding modest deficits.

description.zh: 以征兵和后备动员为基础，重点是国土防御与边境作战。
description.en: Based on conscription and reserve mobilization, focused on territorial defense and border warfare.

description.zh: 负责波罗的海沿岸防御、布雷和近海巡逻。
description.en: Responsible for Baltic coastal defense, mine warfare, and littoral patrol.

description.zh: 规模不大，但承担领空监视、拦截和支援任务。
description.en: Small in size, but tasked with airspace surveillance, interception, and support roles.

commanderInChief.zh: 总统乌尔霍·吉科宁

technology.zh: 军备以二战后改良型火炮、轻装甲、近海舰艇和有限喷气机为主，强调训练、动员和地形利用。
technology.en: Military equipment centered on improved postwar artillery, light armor, coastal craft, and a limited number of jet aircraft, with emphasis on training, mobilization, and terrain use.

threats.zh: 主要安全压力来自冷战前线环境、与苏联接壤带来的战略约束，以及波罗的海地区紧张局势。
threats.en: Main security pressures stemmed from the Cold War frontline environment, the strategic constraints of sharing a border with the Soviet Union, and tensions in the Baltic region.

populationDescription.zh: 芬兰人口约450万，识字率高，公共卫生和教育水平在欧洲处于较好水平。城市化快速推进，但农村和林区人口仍占相当比例。
populationDescription.en: Finland’s population was about 4.5 million, with high literacy and comparatively strong public health and education by European standards. Urbanization was advancing quickly, though rural and forest-region populations still formed a significant share.

socialClasses.zh: 工业工人、农民与林业人口、城市中产专业阶层、公务员、企业主与少量传统上层。
socialClasses.en: Industrial workers, farmers and forestry populations, urban middle-class professionals, civil servants, business owners, and a small traditional upper stratum.

allies.zh: 与北欧邻国关系密切，并与西欧保持经济联系；同时依据芬苏条约维持与苏联的合作性关系。
allies.en: Maintained close relations with the Nordic neighbors and economic links with Western Europe, while also preserving a cooperative relationship with the Soviet Union under the Finno-Soviet treaty framework.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，但任何破坏其中立地位或使其卷入东西方对抗的力量都被视为重大风险。
enemies.en: Had no formal enemy, but any force threatening its neutrality or drawing it into East-West confrontation was seen as a major danger.

foreignPolicy.zh: 奉行积极中立与现实主义外交，在维护民主制度的同时避免刺激苏联，并尽量扩大对西方市场的接触。
foreignPolicy.en: Pursued active neutrality and realist diplomacy, preserving democratic institutions while avoiding provocation of the Soviet Union and expanding access to Western markets where possible.

era.zh: 冷战时期的北欧工业化成熟阶段
era.en: Mature Nordic industrialization during the Cold War

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术集中于林业机械化、纸浆造纸工艺、船舶工程、电力网络和精密金属制造。
keyInnovations.en: Key technologies centered on mechanized forestry, pulp and paper processes, marine engineering, electrical grids, and precision metal manufacturing.

strengths.zh: 教育水平高、工业出口竞争力强、国家治理有效、后备动员体系成熟。
strengths.en: High educational attainment, strong industrial export competitiveness, effective state governance, and a mature reserve mobilization system.

weaknesses.zh: 国内市场规模有限，能源和部分原料依赖进口，外交上受苏联压力约束明显。
weaknesses.en: Limited domestic market size, dependence on imported energy and some raw materials, and significant diplomatic constraints from Soviet pressure.

outlook.zh: 若能继续维持中立与出口增长，芬兰有望在1960年代进一步迈向富裕工业社会。
outlook.en: If it could continue to maintain neutrality and export growth, Finland was well positioned to move further toward a prosperous industrial society in the 1960s.

description.zh: 1962年的芬兰是一个在冷战夹缝中以中立外交、工业出口和高效治理维持繁荣的北欧共和国。
description.en: In 1962, Finland was a Nordic republic sustaining prosperity through neutrality, industrial exports, and effective governance amid Cold War pressures.

governmentForm.zh: 1962年的爱尔兰是议会民主共和国，总统为国家元首而政府实际权力由总理和内阁掌握。
governmentForm.en: In 1962, Ireland was a parliamentary democratic republic in which the president was head of state while effective executive power rested with the taoiseach and cabinet.

socialStructure.zh: 社会仍带有较强的农村和天主教保守特征，但城市中产阶层和受教育青年正在扩大。农业、小城镇社会和家族网络在日常生活中仍具重要地位。
socialStructure.en: Society retained a strongly rural and Catholic conservative character, though the urban middle class and educated youth were growing. Agriculture, small-town life, and family networks remained central to everyday life.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层由主要政党政治家、高级公务员、法律界人士、工商精英和教会影响网络共同构成。虽然宪政上政教分离，但天主教会在社会政策上仍有显著影响。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted of major party politicians, senior civil servants, legal professionals, business elites, and networks influenced by the Church. Although constitutionally church and state were separate, the Catholic Church still held significant influence over social policy.

succession.zh: 国家元首和政府均通过宪法与选举程序更替，政权交接和平稳定。主要政党竞争在议会框架内进行。
succession.en: Both the head of state and government changed through constitutional and electoral procedures, with peaceful transfers of power. Competition among the main parties took place within the parliamentary framework.

structure.zh: 爱尔兰实行议会制共和国，众议院产生政府，总理由总统任命。中央政府规模中等，以财政、农业、教育和对外贸易政策为主要治理重点。
structure.en: Ireland operated as a parliamentary republic in which the Dáil produced the government and the taoiseach was appointed by the president. The central government was moderate in size, focusing chiefly on finance, agriculture, education, and external trade policy.

function.zh: 编制预算、税收管理、公共支出控制与经济规划。
function.en: Prepared the budget, managed taxation, controlled public spending, and coordinated economic planning.

function.zh: 负责农产品政策、畜牧业、出口检验和农村发展。
function.en: Handled farm policy, livestock, export inspection, and rural development.

function.zh: 推动工业化、贸易促进、就业和对外投资。
function.en: Promoted industrialization, trade, employment, and foreign investment.

function.zh: 管理学校体系、教师政策和课程标准。
function.en: Managed the school system, teacher policy, and curricular standards.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政通过郡议会和城市机构运作，但中央政府在财政和政策上具有明显主导地位。地方治理能力因区域而异。
localAdmin.en: Local administration operated through county councils and urban authorities, but the central government retained clear dominance in finance and policy. Local administrative capacity varied by region.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系承袭普通法传统并受1937年宪法框架约束。法院体系稳定，司法独立原则得到普遍承认。
legalSystem.en: The legal system followed the common-law tradition within the constitutional framework of 1937. The court system was stable, and judicial independence was widely recognized.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收主要依靠所得税、消费税、关税和企业税。税基相对有限，财政收入受经济增长和贸易表现影响较大。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied mainly on income tax, excises, customs duties, and company taxes. The tax base was relatively limited, and public revenue depended significantly on economic growth and trade performance.

religion.zh: 天主教

culturalAchievements.zh: 爱尔兰在文学、戏剧、诗歌和民族音乐方面享有极高国际声誉，国家认同深受语言复兴和独立运动记忆塑造。广播与教育体系也在塑造现代爱尔兰文化方面发挥更大作用。
culturalAchievements.en: Ireland enjoyed an exceptionally high international reputation in literature, drama, poetry, and traditional music, while national identity was deeply shaped by the language revival and memories of independence. Broadcasting and education were also playing a larger role in shaping modern Irish culture.

languageFamily.zh: 英语属印欧语系日耳曼语族，爱尔兰语属印欧语系凯尔特语族。
languageFamily.en: English belongs to the Indo-European Germanic branch, while Irish belongs to the Indo-European Celtic branch.

philosophy.zh: 强调天主教伦理、民族独立、盖尔传统与家庭价值，同时逐步接纳现代经济发展的务实观念。
philosophy.en: Emphasized Catholic ethics, national independence, Gaelic tradition, and family values, while gradually accepting a more pragmatic outlook toward modern economic development.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用拉丁字母书写英语和爱尔兰语。
writingSystem.en: Used the Latin alphabet for both English and Irish.

gdpDescription.zh: 爱尔兰经济正从长期依赖农业和英国市场的模式转向更开放的工业化道路。经济增速较战后早期有所改善，但失业和移民外流仍是重要问题。
gdpDescription.en: Ireland’s economy was shifting from a long-standing dependence on agriculture and the British market toward a more open path of industrialization. Growth had improved over the immediate postwar era, but unemployment and outward migration remained serious problems.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、食品加工、畜产品出口、酿造、纺织、轻工业、建筑业
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, food processing, livestock exports, brewing, textiles, light industry, and construction

tradeGoods.zh: 牛肉、黄油、活牲畜、啤酒、纺织品、机械和燃料进口
tradeGoods.en: Beef, butter, live cattle, beer, textiles, and imported machinery and fuels

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富多集中于农地、住房、牲畜和储蓄，城市居民对工资收入依赖更高。总体财富水平中等，但与英国相比仍偏低。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was concentrated in farmland, housing, livestock, and savings, while urban residents relied more heavily on wage income. Overall wealth was moderate but remained below British levels.

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济为主、国家通过贸易和工业政策进行引导的混合经济。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy based mainly on markets, with the state guiding development through trade and industrial policy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库保持基本稳健，但财政余地不大，经济波动和移民导致的税基疲弱会迅速影响预算。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury remained basically sound, but fiscal room was limited, and budget performance could be quickly affected by economic fluctuations and a weak tax base caused by emigration.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策总体审慎，兼顾社会支出、农业支持与工业投资激励，力图在不削弱信用的前提下推动增长。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was generally cautious, balancing social spending, agricultural support, and industrial investment incentives while trying to promote growth without undermining creditworthiness.

description.zh: 国家防务主体，装备轻型，兼顾边境安全和国内紧急任务。
description.en: The main defense arm, lightly equipped and tasked with border security as well as domestic emergencies.

description.zh: 负责近海巡逻、渔业保护和海上执法。
description.en: Responsible for coastal patrol, fisheries protection, and maritime enforcement.

description.zh: 规模较小，主要承担运输、巡逻、训练和有限空中支援。
description.en: Small in scale, mainly providing transport, patrol, training, and limited air support.

commanderInChief.zh: 总统埃蒙·德·瓦莱拉

technology.zh: 军备以轻武器、少量装甲车、巡逻舰和基础航空器为主，不具备大规模现代战争能力。
technology.en: Military equipment centered on small arms, a few armored vehicles, patrol vessels, and basic aircraft, without the capacity for large-scale modern warfare.

threats.zh: 主要威胁不是外部入侵，而是有限海空防卫能力、北爱尔兰问题的长期政治敏感性，以及冷战下周边安全环境变化。
threats.en: The main threats were not external invasion but limited sea and air defense capacity, the enduring political sensitivity of Northern Ireland, and shifts in the surrounding Cold War security environment.

populationDescription.zh: 爱尔兰人口约280万，城镇化正在推进，但农村人口比重仍高。出生率相对较高，但长期移民外流抑制了人口增长。
populationDescription.en: Ireland’s population was about 2.8 million, and urbanization was progressing, though the rural share remained high. Birth rates were relatively high, but long-term emigration suppressed overall population growth.

socialClasses.zh: 农民与农场主、城市工人、文职与专业中产、商人企业主、少量传统上层与宗教机构精英。
socialClasses.en: Farmers and farm owners, urban workers, clerical and professional middle classes, merchants and business owners, and a small traditional upper stratum alongside religious institutional elites.

allies.zh: 与英国、美国及西欧国家保持友好关系，但避免正式军事同盟；同英联邦国家也有广泛经济联系。
allies.en: Maintained friendly relations with Britain, the United States, and Western European states, while avoiding formal military alliances; it also had broad economic links with Commonwealth countries.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，但与英国围绕北爱尔兰问题存在长期政治分歧。
enemies.en: Had no formal enemy, but long-standing political disagreement with Britain persisted over Northern Ireland.

foreignPolicy.zh: 奉行军事中立、重视联合国平台与主权独立，同时寻求扩大对欧洲市场的经济接触。
foreignPolicy.en: Pursued military neutrality, valued the United Nations and sovereign independence, and sought broader economic access to European markets.

era.zh: 冷战时期西欧边缘国家的中等工业化阶段
era.en: A mid-level industrialization stage in a peripheral Western European Cold War state

keyInnovations.zh: 技术进步主要体现在农业机械化、食品加工、电力扩展、道路建设和轻工业现代化。
keyInnovations.en: Technological progress was most visible in agricultural mechanization, food processing, electricity expansion, road building, and light industrial modernization.

strengths.zh: 政治制度稳定、社会凝聚力较强、英语优势明显、农业与食品出口基础稳固。
strengths.en: Stable political institutions, relatively strong social cohesion, a major advantage from the English language, and a solid base in agriculture and food exports.

weaknesses.zh: 工业基础偏弱、对外市场依赖高、长期移民削弱劳动力和内需，军力有限。
weaknesses.en: A relatively weak industrial base, heavy dependence on external markets, long-term emigration draining labor and domestic demand, and limited military capacity.

outlook.zh: 若开放政策和工业引资继续推进，爱尔兰在1960年代后期有望逐步摆脱停滞，但短期仍受移民和就业不足困扰。
outlook.en: If openness and industrial investment policies continued, Ireland could gradually move beyond stagnation later in the 1960s, though in the short term it would still struggle with emigration and insufficient employment.

description.zh: 1962年的爱尔兰是一个以议会民主、天主教社会传统和谨慎经济开放并存为特征的中立共和国。
description.en: In 1962, Ireland was a neutral republic marked by parliamentary democracy, Catholic social traditions, and cautious economic opening.

governmentForm.zh: 奥地利在1962年是一个议会民主制联邦共和国，总统为国家元首，总理由议会多数支持产生并主持政府。
governmentForm.en: In 1962 Austria was a federal parliamentary republic, with the president as head of state and a chancellor backed by a parliamentary majority leading the government.

socialStructure.zh: 奥地利社会以城市中产阶级、产业工人、农民和公务员群体为主体。战后重建推动了福利国家扩展，工会、雇主组织与政府之间形成了较强的“社会伙伴关系”。传统天主教价值观仍具影响力，但城市社会已明显现代化。
socialStructure.en: Austrian society was centered on an urban middle class, industrial workers, farmers, and civil servants. Postwar reconstruction expanded the welfare state, while unions, employers, and government developed a strong system of “social partnership.” Traditional Catholic values remained influential, though urban society had become distinctly modernized.

rulingClass.zh: 执政精英主要由人民党与社会党高层、联邦官僚、工商界代表和州级政治人物构成。国家治理强调两大党协商与制度稳定。
rulingClass.en: The ruling elite consisted mainly of leaders of the People’s Party and Socialist Party, senior federal bureaucrats, business representatives, and provincial politicians. Governance emphasized bargaining between the two major parties and institutional stability.

succession.zh: 国家领导人通过宪法程序更替，总统经选举产生，联邦总理由总统任命但须依赖国民议会多数支持。政权交接以选举和党派协商为核心，而非世袭。
succession.en: National leaders changed through constitutional procedures: the president was elected, and the federal chancellor was appointed by the president but depended on parliamentary majority support. Transfer of power rested on elections and party negotiation rather than heredity.

structure.zh: 奥地利实行联邦制，中央政府设于维也纳，下辖各州拥有一定自治权限。国家政治以国民议会、联邦参议院、联邦总统和联邦政府构成的宪政架构运作。行政上高度制度化，战后国家机器恢复完整并趋于稳定。
structure.en: Austria operated as a federal state, with the central government in Vienna and the Länder retaining limited autonomous powers. National politics functioned through a constitutional structure composed of the National Council, Federal Council, federal president, and federal government. Administration was highly institutionalized, and the postwar state apparatus had largely stabilized.

function.zh: 负责国内治安、警察、地方行政监督与人口登记。
function.en: Handled internal security, police, supervision of local administration, and civil registration.

function.zh: 负责税收、预算编制、国库与金融监管协调。
function.en: Managed taxation, budget preparation, the treasury, and coordination of financial oversight.

function.zh: 负责联邦军建设、国防规划与动员体系。
function.en: Oversaw the federal armed forces, defense planning, and mobilization systems.

name.zh: 联邦贸易与重建相关经济部门
name.en: Federal economic ministries for trade and reconstruction

function.zh: 负责工业政策、贸易协调、基础设施和战后经济发展。
function.en: Handled industrial policy, trade coordination, infrastructure, and postwar economic development.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政分为州、区与市镇三级，州政府在教育、地方建设和部分财政事务上具有重要作用。维也纳兼具州与市双重地位，是全国最重要的行政中心。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was divided into Länder, districts, and municipalities, with provincial governments playing important roles in education, local development, and some fiscal matters. Vienna held a dual status as both a province and a municipality and was the country’s leading administrative center.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系属于大陆法传统，以成文法和宪法法院审查为核心。战后奥地利法治秩序已基本恢复，并强调中立国家身份下的宪政连续性。
legalSystem.en: The legal system belonged to the civil-law tradition, centered on codified law and constitutional review. By the postwar period Austria had largely restored the rule of law and emphasized constitutional continuity under its neutral status.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以所得税、营业税、消费税和关税为主，并逐步配合社会保险缴费构成现代财政体系。税负相对温和，但足以支持福利与基础设施开支。
taxationSystem.en: The tax system relied mainly on income taxes, business taxes, excise duties, and customs, complemented by social insurance contributions in a modern fiscal framework. The overall burden was moderate but sufficient to support welfare and infrastructure spending.

religion.zh: 天主教

culturalAchievements.zh: 奥地利在音乐、戏剧、建筑与心理学传统方面持续具有国际声望，维也纳仍是欧洲文化重镇。战后电影、歌剧和古典音乐机构恢复活力，并成为国家形象的重要组成部分。
culturalAchievements.en: Austria retained international prestige in music, theater, architecture, and the intellectual legacy of psychology, with Vienna remaining a major European cultural center. Postwar film, opera, and classical music institutions regained vitality and formed an important part of the country’s national image.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Germanic branch

philosophy.zh: 以中欧天主教人文主义、自由民主宪政观念与战后社会市场取向为主。
philosophy.en: Rooted in Central European Catholic humanism, liberal-democratic constitutionalism, and a postwar social-market orientation.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母书写的德语
writingSystem.en: German written in the Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 奥地利经济在战后高速恢复后保持较强增长，工业、旅游业和对西欧贸易共同支撑繁荣。中立地位有助于其成为东西欧之间相对开放的经济节点。
gdpDescription.en: Austria’s economy maintained strong growth after rapid postwar recovery, supported by industry, tourism, and trade with Western Europe. Its neutral status also helped it function as a relatively open economic link between East and West.

mainIndustries.zh: 机械制造、钢铁、化工、木材加工、纺织、电力、旅游业
mainIndustries.en: Machinery, steel, chemicals, timber processing, textiles, electric power, tourism

tradeGoods.zh: 机械设备、钢材、纸张、木材制品、化工品、消费品
tradeGoods.en: Machinery, steel products, paper, timber goods, chemicals, consumer manufactures

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富总体处于西欧中等偏上水平，城市家庭拥有较稳定工资收入和逐步普及的耐用消费品。农村地区收入较低，但生活条件较战后初期明显改善。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was generally at a middling-to-upper Western European level, with urban families enjoying stable wage incomes and increasing access to durable consumer goods. Rural incomes were lower, but living standards had improved markedly since the immediate postwar years.

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济为基础，辅以强力社会伙伴协商机制和一定程度的国家干预。
economicSystem.en: A market economy underpinned by strong social-partnership bargaining and a moderate degree of state intervention.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库状况总体稳健，虽有适度赤字，但受益于增长中的税基和稳定货币。财政能力足以支持中立国防务、福利和基础设施项目。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was generally sound; although there was a modest deficit, it benefited from a growing tax base and monetary stability. Fiscal capacity was sufficient to support neutral-state defense, welfare, and infrastructure programs.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏向稳健扩张，在控制通胀的同时维持公共投资和社会保障支出。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy favored cautious expansion, maintaining public investment and social welfare spending while trying to control inflation.

description.zh: 作为主力军种，负责领土防御、山地作战和全国动员体系。
description.en: The principal service branch, responsible for territorial defense, mountain warfare, and national mobilization.

description.zh: 规模较小，承担领空巡逻、训练和基础防空任务。
description.en: A relatively small force tasked with airspace patrol, training, and basic air defense duties.

description.zh: 负责通信、工兵、补给和医疗保障。
description.en: Handled communications, engineering, supply, and medical support.

commanderInChief.zh: 联邦总统阿道夫·舍尔夫（宪法上的统帅）

technology.zh: 装备水平属中等，依赖战后重建与有限现代化，拥有轻型装甲、火炮、基础喷气机与山地防御能力，但缺乏大规模进攻性体系。
technology.en: Its equipment level was moderate, relying on postwar rebuilding and limited modernization, with light armor, artillery, basic jet aircraft, and mountain-defense capabilities but no large offensive structure.

threats.zh: 主要安全压力来自冷战时期中欧紧张局势、邻近华约与北约对峙，以及维护永久中立所需的最低威慑能力。
threats.en: Its main security pressures stemmed from Cold War tensions in Central Europe, the nearby confrontation between NATO and the Warsaw Pact, and the need to maintain minimum deterrent capacity for permanent neutrality.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约710万，主体为德语居民，少量斯洛文尼亚、克罗地亚和其他少数群体分布于边境地区。战后婴儿潮与城市就业机会推动人口向工业和服务中心集中。
populationDescription.en: The population was about 7.1 million, predominantly German-speaking, with small Slovene, Croat, and other minorities in border regions. The postwar baby boom and urban employment opportunities encouraged concentration in industrial and service centers.

socialClasses.zh: 主要包括城市中产阶级、产业工人、农民、小商业者与公务员阶层。
socialClasses.en: Mainly composed of an urban middle class, industrial workers, farmers, small business owners, and civil servants.

allies.zh: 奥地利奉行中立政策，不加入军事同盟，但与西德、意大利、瑞士、美国及西欧国家保持良好关系，同时与东欧国家维持务实往来。
allies.en: Austria followed a policy of neutrality and belonged to no military alliance, but maintained good relations with West Germany, Italy, Switzerland, the United States, and other Western European states while also keeping pragmatic ties with Eastern Europe.

enemies.zh: 无明确法定敌国，但对任何可能侵犯其中立地位的大国对抗均保持警惕。
enemies.en: It had no formal enemy state, but remained wary of any great-power confrontation that might compromise its neutrality.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交重心是维护永久中立、扩大经济联系、提升维也纳的国际调停地位并避免卷入集团对抗。
foreignPolicy.en: Its foreign policy focused on preserving permanent neutrality, expanding economic ties, enhancing Vienna’s role as an international intermediary, and avoiding entanglement in bloc confrontation.

era.zh: 冷战早期工业化与消费社会扩张阶段
era.en: Early Cold War industrial and expanding consumer-society phase

keyInnovations.zh: 水电开发、山地交通工程、机械制造现代化、化工与电气工业升级。
keyInnovations.en: Hydroelectric development, alpine transport engineering, modernization of machinery production, and upgrades in chemicals and electrical industry.

strengths.zh: 政治稳定、经济增长较快、文化声望高且中立地位带来外交灵活性。
strengths.en: Political stability, relatively fast economic growth, high cultural prestige, and diplomatic flexibility derived from neutrality.

weaknesses.zh: 国土与人口规模有限，军力偏弱，经济对外贸和西欧市场依赖较大。
weaknesses.en: Limited territory and population, comparatively weak military power, and significant dependence on foreign trade and Western European markets.

outlook.zh: 若继续保持中立与社会协商体制，奥地利在1960年代前景总体乐观，并可能进一步巩固其繁荣与国际桥梁角色。
outlook.en: If it continued to uphold neutrality and social partnership, Austria’s outlook in the 1960s was broadly favorable, with prospects for greater prosperity and a stronger role as an international bridge.

description.zh: 1962年的奥地利是一个稳定、富裕且奉行永久中立的中欧联邦共和国。
description.en: Austria in 1962 was a stable, prosperous Central European federal republic committed to permanent neutrality.

governmentForm.zh: 罗马尼亚在1962年是由共产党一党主导的社会主义人民共和国，国家权力名义上属于人民代表机关，实际由党领导层集中掌控。
governmentForm.en: In 1962 Romania was a socialist people’s republic dominated by a single communist party, with state power nominally vested in representative organs but effectively controlled by the party leadership.

socialStructure.zh: 社会结构以产业工人、集体化后的农民、党政干部和技术知识分子为主。国家通过计划经济、政治动员和安全机关深入影响社会生活。农村人口仍占较大比重，但工业化和城市化正在加速。
socialStructure.en: The social structure was centered on industrial workers, collectivized peasants, party-state cadres, and technical intelligentsia. The state penetrated social life through planning, political mobilization, and the security apparatus. The rural population remained large, but industrialization and urbanization were accelerating.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层由罗马尼亚工人党领导层、国家安全机构高层、军队高级将领和中央计划系统官僚组成。格奥尔基·乔治乌-德治及其核心圈在政治上具有决定性影响。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted of the leadership of the Romanian Workers’ Party, senior state security officials, top military officers, and bureaucrats in the central planning system. Gheorghe Gheorghiu-Dej and his inner circle exercised decisive political influence.

succession.zh: 领导更替并非通过自由选举，而是通过党内任命、中央委员会与政治局权力斗争完成。国家主席和政府职位服从于党的领导安排。
succession.en: Leadership succession did not occur through free elections but through party appointments and struggles within the Central Committee and Politburo. State and government offices were subordinate to party decisions.

structure.zh: 国家采取苏联式党国结构，最高权力由共产党中央机关主导，部长会议负责执行经济与行政计划。大国民议会在形式上是最高国家机关，但主要起批准和象征作用。安全机构在治理中占有突出位置。
structure.en: The state followed a Soviet-style party-state structure, with supreme power directed by communist central organs and the Council of Ministers executing economic and administrative plans. The Great National Assembly was formally the highest state organ but mainly served a ratifying and symbolic role. The security apparatus held a prominent place in governance.

name.zh: 部长会议及国家计划委员会
name.en: Council of Ministers and State Planning Committee

function.zh: 负责国民经济计划、工业目标、投资与资源分配。
function.en: Managed national economic plans, industrial targets, investment, and resource allocation.

function.zh: 负责公安、边防、政治监控及国家安全事务。
function.en: Handled police, border forces, political surveillance, and state security matters.

function.zh: 负责军队建设、华约协调和国土防务。
function.en: Oversaw military organization, Warsaw Pact coordination, and territorial defense.

name.zh: 农业与轻工业相关部门

function.zh: 负责集体农庄、国营农场、食品供给和消费品生产管理。
function.en: Managed collective farms, state farms, food supply, and production of consumer goods.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由省区和下级人民委员会执行，干部任命受党中央严格控制。地方政府主要负责落实中央计划、征购任务和社会控制。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was carried out through regional and lower-level people’s councils, with cadre appointments tightly controlled by the party center. Local government mainly implemented central plans, procurement obligations, and social control.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系形式上为社会主义成文法体系，司法机关受党和国家政治目标约束。涉及政治案件时，法律程序常服从国家安全和意识形态需要。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was formally a socialist codified system, but the judiciary was constrained by party and state political goals. In political cases, legal procedure often yielded to state security and ideological priorities.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入主要来自国营企业上缴利润、营业税、农业征购与工资税，而非典型市场型税制。税收与价格体系共同服务于中央计划与工业积累。
taxationSystem.en: Fiscal revenue came chiefly from remitted profits of state enterprises, turnover taxes, agricultural procurement, and wage taxes rather than a typical market tax structure. Taxation and administered prices jointly served central planning and industrial accumulation.

religion.zh: 东正教

culturalAchievements.zh: 国家大力扶持工业题材文学、社会主义现实主义艺术和群众文化教育，同时保留部分罗马尼亚民族历史与民俗展示。电影、广播和出版被广泛用于意识形态传播与社会动员。
culturalAchievements.en: The state heavily promoted industrial-themed literature, socialist realist art, and mass cultural education while preserving selected displays of Romanian national history and folklore. Film, radio, and publishing were widely used for ideological dissemination and social mobilization.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Romance branch

philosophy.zh: 官方意识形态为马克思列宁主义，并逐渐融入罗马尼亚民族共产党式叙事。
philosophy.en: The official ideology was Marxism-Leninism, increasingly blended with a Romanian national-communist narrative.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母书写的罗马尼亚语
writingSystem.en: Romanian written in the Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 罗马尼亚经济正处于强制工业化阶段，重工业和能源开发增长显著，但消费品短缺与农业效率问题依然存在。计划体制推动了产值扩张，却也带来资源错配和生活水平受压。
gdpDescription.en: Romania’s economy was in a phase of forced industrialization, with heavy industry and energy development expanding markedly, though consumer-goods shortages and weak agricultural efficiency persisted. The planned system drove output growth but also produced resource misallocation and pressure on living standards.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油开采、炼油、钢铁、机械制造、化工、煤炭、电力、农业加工
mainIndustries.en: Oil extraction, refining, steel, machinery, chemicals, coal, electric power, agricultural processing

tradeGoods.zh: 石油产品、木材、机械设备、化肥、谷物、工业原料
tradeGoods.en: Petroleum products, timber, machinery, fertilizers, grain, industrial raw materials

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富普遍有限，多数居民依赖工资、配给与国家定价商品。城市工人家庭在住房和教育方面有所改善，但消费选择狭窄，农村家庭则仍较贫困。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was generally limited, with most residents depending on wages, rationed access, and state-priced goods. Urban worker households saw some gains in housing and education, but consumer choice remained narrow, while rural households were still comparatively poor.

economicSystem.zh: 中央计划社会主义经济，以国有制和农业集体化为基础。
economicSystem.en: A centrally planned socialist economy based on state ownership and agricultural collectivization.

source.zh: 营业税与价格差额收入
source.en: Turnover taxes and administered price margins

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库受中央计划体系和投资优先政策支配，现金流依赖国营部门上缴和行政定价。虽然存在财政压力，但国家能够通过价格控制、信贷分配和强制储蓄机制维持运转。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was shaped by central planning and investment-first policies, with cash flow dependent on remittances from state sectors and administratively set prices. Despite fiscal pressure, the state could maintain operations through price controls, directed credit, and compulsory saving mechanisms.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策强调重工业优先、压低消费、集中资源用于工业化和国家安全。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized heavy industry first, restrained consumption, and concentrated resources on industrialization and state security.

description.zh: 罗马尼亚武装力量主干，配备苏式步兵、装甲和炮兵部队，承担华约框架下的陆上防御任务。
description.en: The core of Romania’s armed forces, equipped with Soviet-style infantry, armor, and artillery for land defense within the Warsaw Pact framework.

description.zh: 负责领空防御、战术航空支援和防空导向体系建设。
description.en: Responsible for airspace defense, tactical air support, and the development of an air-defense network.

description.zh: 主要部署于黑海和多瑙河口，承担海岸防卫和巡逻任务。
description.en: Mainly deployed in the Black Sea and Danube delta areas for coastal defense and patrol duties.

commanderInChief.zh: 国务委员会与党领导层实际统辖，最高政治领导人为格奥尔基·乔治乌-德治
commanderInChief.en: Effectively controlled by the State Council and party leadership, with Gheorghe Gheorghiu-Dej as the supreme political leader

technology.zh: 军队技术体系基本依赖苏联装备与训练模式，包括T-34/85等装甲车辆、喷气战斗机和中等火炮，但本国军工自主性仍有限。
technology.en: Military technology relied largely on Soviet equipment and training models, including T-34/85-type armor, jet fighters, and medium artillery, though domestic defense-industrial autonomy remained limited.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自冷战阵营对抗、巴尔干和黑海地区战略紧张，以及对内部异议和边境安全的高度敏感。
threats.en: Major threats stemmed from Cold War bloc confrontation, strategic tensions in the Balkans and Black Sea region, and strong sensitivity to internal dissent and border security.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约1850万，主体为罗马尼亚族，另有匈牙利族、德意志族、罗姆人及其他少数群体。农村人口仍占多数，但国家工业化政策正持续推动劳动力向城市迁移。
populationDescription.en: The population was about 18.5 million, predominantly ethnic Romanian, with Hungarian, German, Roma, and other minorities. Rural inhabitants still formed the majority, but state industrialization policies were steadily moving labor toward the cities.

socialClasses.zh: 官方上强调工人、合作化农民和社会主义知识分子；实际上则存在党政干部特权层、产业工人、农民和城市技术人员差异。
socialClasses.en: Officially the state emphasized workers, collectivized peasants, and socialist intellectuals; in practice there were clear differences between privileged party-state cadres, industrial workers, peasants, and urban technical personnel.

allies.zh: 主要盟友为苏联、华约成员国和经互会国家，同时与中国等社会主义国家维持正式关系。
allies.en: Its main allies were the Soviet Union, fellow Warsaw Pact members, and Comecon states, while maintaining formal relations with other socialist countries including China.

enemies.zh: 官方敌对对象主要是北约阵营中的“帝国主义国家”，尤其是美国及其盟友的战略压力。
enemies.en: Its official adversaries were the “imperialist” states of the NATO bloc, especially the strategic pressure posed by the United States and its allies.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交上总体追随苏联阵营，但已开始寻求更大政策自主空间，强调国家主权、工业发展和在社会主义阵营中的相对独立性。
foreignPolicy.en: Romanian foreign policy broadly followed the Soviet bloc, but it had already begun seeking greater room for maneuver, stressing national sovereignty, industrial development, and relative autonomy within the socialist camp.

era.zh: 冷战早期社会主义重工业化阶段
era.en: Early Cold War socialist heavy-industrialization phase

keyInnovations.zh: 石油炼化扩建、钢铁联合企业、化肥工业、电气化工程和机械制造能力提升。
keyInnovations.en: Expansion of petroleum refining, integrated steel combines, fertilizer industry growth, electrification projects, and improved machinery manufacturing capacity.

strengths.zh: 人口与资源基础较大，石油与农业潜力显著，国家动员能力强，工业化推进迅速。
strengths.en: It possessed a large population and resource base, significant oil and agricultural potential, strong state mobilization capacity, and rapid industrialization.

weaknesses.zh: 计划经济效率偏低，消费品短缺，政治高压严重，技术仍依赖苏联体系。
weaknesses.en: The planned economy was inefficient, consumer goods were scarce, political repression was severe, and technology still depended heavily on the Soviet system.

outlook.zh: 若工业化持续推进且对外自主性扩大，罗马尼亚可能增强区域地位；但若资源错配和政治僵化加剧，长期发展将受限。
outlook.en: If industrialization continued and foreign-policy autonomy widened, Romania could strengthen its regional standing; however, worsening resource misallocation and political rigidity would constrain long-term development.

description.zh: 1962年的罗马尼亚是一个由共产党统治、处于重工业化加速阶段的东欧社会主义国家。
description.en: Romania in 1962 was a communist-ruled Eastern European socialist state undergoing accelerated heavy industrialization.

governmentForm.zh: 匈牙利在1962年是由社会主义工人党领导的一党制人民共和国，国家机构依照社会主义宪制运行，但实权集中于党领导层。
governmentForm.en: In 1962 Hungary was a one-party people’s republic led by the Socialist Workers’ Party, with state institutions operating under a socialist constitution but real power concentrated in the party leadership.

socialStructure.zh: 1956年事件后，社会逐步从强制高压转向更务实的稳定化治理，工人、合作化农民和技术知识分子成为官方强调的主体。城市工业就业扩大，但乡村人口仍然重要。社会在政治上趋于谨慎，普遍追求秩序和生活改善。
socialStructure.en: After the events of 1956, society gradually shifted from harsh coercion to more pragmatic stabilization, with workers, collectivized peasants, and technical intellectuals officially emphasized as core groups. Urban industrial employment expanded, but the countryside remained important. Politically, society grew cautious and broadly sought order and improved living conditions.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层主要包括匈牙利社会主义工人党中央高层、国家安全与行政官僚、企业管理者和军队高级干部。亚诺什·卡达尔以相对务实的领导风格巩固了政权。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class mainly included the top leadership of the Hungarian Socialist Workers’ Party, state-security and administrative bureaucrats, enterprise managers, and senior military officers. János Kádár consolidated power through a relatively pragmatic style of rule.

succession.zh: 国家领导更替由党内程序决定，中央委员会和政治局对高级职位任免起决定作用。形式上的国家机关选举不构成真正竞争性继承机制。
succession.en: Leadership succession was determined through internal party procedures, with the Central Committee and Politburo deciding senior appointments. Formal state elections did not constitute a genuinely competitive mechanism of succession.

structure.zh: 匈牙利实行典型党国体制，部长会议负责行政执行，国民议会主要承担立法确认功能。党中央对国家、经济和社会组织拥有最高指挥权。1956年后政府在维持政治控制的同时，更注重经济管理与社会安抚。
structure.en: Hungary operated a typical party-state system, with the Council of Ministers handling administration and the National Assembly mainly confirming legislation. The party center held supreme authority over the state, economy, and social organizations. After 1956 the government combined political control with greater emphasis on economic management and social pacification.

name.zh: 部长会议与国家计划机关
name.en: Council of Ministers and State Planning organs

function.zh: 负责经济计划、投资安排、工业生产目标和资源调配。
function.en: Managed economic planning, investment allocation, industrial output targets, and resource distribution.

function.zh: 负责公安、政治安全、边境管理和社会治安。
function.en: Handled policing, political security, border management, and internal order.

function.zh: 负责人民军组织、训练与华约协调。
function.en: Oversaw the People’s Army, training, and coordination with the Warsaw Pact.

function.zh: 负责合作化农业、食品供应和农村生产管理。
function.en: Managed collectivized agriculture, food supply, and rural production administration.

localAdmin.zh: 地方上由州级和县级人民委员会、区镇机构执行中央政策，干部任命受党组织控制。地方行政重点在于落实计划指标、维持社会秩序和管理合作社。
localAdmin.en: At the local level, county and municipal people’s councils implemented central policy under party-controlled cadre appointments. Local administration focused on fulfilling plan targets, maintaining order, and managing cooperatives.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系为社会主义法制，法院名义上独立但实际服从党的政治方向。1956年后政治司法仍然存在，但总体上较最严厉时期更趋制度化。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was socialist in form; courts were nominally independent but in practice followed party political direction. Political justice persisted after 1956, though it became somewhat more institutionalized than in the harshest earlier period.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入主要来自国营企业利润、营业税、工资税和农业相关征收。税制并非市场型自由课税体系，而是中央计划配置资源的附属工具。
taxationSystem.en: State revenue derived mainly from profits of state enterprises, turnover taxes, wage taxes, and agricultural collections. Taxation was not a market-based liberal system but an auxiliary tool for resource allocation under central planning.

religion.zh: 天主教

culturalAchievements.zh: 匈牙利在文学、音乐、数学和电影方面保持较强传统，国家文化机构在审查下继续运作。1960年代初的文化生活较拉科西时期略有松动，但仍受政治边界限制。
culturalAchievements.en: Hungary maintained strong traditions in literature, music, mathematics, and film, and state cultural institutions continued to function under censorship. Cultural life in the early 1960s was somewhat looser than under the Rákosi era, though still constrained by political boundaries.

languageFamily.zh: 乌拉尔语系芬兰-乌戈尔语族
languageFamily.en: Uralic, Finno-Ugric branch

philosophy.zh: 官方上以马克思列宁主义为核心，实践中则逐渐融入较务实的“稳定优先”社会主义治理观。
philosophy.en: Officially centered on Marxism-Leninism, but in practice increasingly infused with a pragmatic socialist approach prioritizing stability.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母书写的匈牙利语
writingSystem.en: Hungarian written in the Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 匈牙利经济在1956年后完成恢复，工业和农业合作化并行推进。虽然仍受计划体制束缚，但相比一些东欧国家，政策已开始更强调消费供给和实际效率。
gdpDescription.en: Hungary’s economy had recovered after 1956, with industry and agricultural collectivization advancing together. Though still constrained by the planned system, policy had begun placing somewhat greater emphasis on consumer supply and practical efficiency than in some other Eastern European states.

mainIndustries.zh: 机械制造、公共汽车与车辆制造、铝业、化工、食品加工、纺织、农业
mainIndustries.en: Machinery, bus and vehicle manufacturing, aluminum, chemicals, food processing, textiles, agriculture

tradeGoods.zh: 机械设备、车辆、铝制品、食品、药品、农产品
tradeGoods.en: Machinery, vehicles, aluminum products, foodstuffs, pharmaceuticals, agricultural goods

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富总体有限，但城市居民的工资稳定性和基本消费品可得性较1950年代初有所改善。农村合作化完成后，农民家庭的私人副业仍是补充生活的重要来源。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth remained limited overall, but urban residents enjoyed more stable wages and somewhat better access to basic consumer goods than in the early 1950s. After collectivization, peasant households still relied heavily on private sideline production to supplement living standards.

economicSystem.zh: 中央计划社会主义经济，但开始呈现较务实、较重视民生供给的调整倾向。
economicSystem.en: A centrally planned socialist economy, though one beginning to show a more pragmatic tendency and greater attention to consumer welfare.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库能力依托计划经济和国营部门现金流，整体可维持国家运作，但投资需求和消费改善目标之间常存在张力。财政空间有限，却较1956年后最困难阶段有所恢复。
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury capacity rested on the planned economy and cash flows from state enterprises; it was sufficient to keep the state functioning, though tensions persisted between investment demands and goals of improving consumption. Fiscal room was limited but better than in the hardest period after 1956.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策兼顾政治稳定和工业增长，在继续投资的同时略微增加民生与消费品供给支持。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy sought to balance political stability with industrial growth, continuing investment while modestly increasing support for living standards and consumer supply.

description.zh: 人民军主体，负责机械化地面作战、国土防御和华约协同任务。
description.en: The main component of the People’s Army, responsible for mechanized ground warfare, territorial defense, and Warsaw Pact cooperation.

name.en: Air Force and Air Defence Troops

description.zh: 承担领空巡逻、近距支援和防空任务，装备以苏制飞机和防空武器为主。
description.en: Handled air patrols, close support, and air-defense duties, using mainly Soviet-made aircraft and anti-air systems.

description.zh: 负责边境警戒、工兵、通信和后勤保障。
description.en: Responsible for border security, engineering, communications, and logistical support.

commanderInChief.zh: 实际最高领导人为亚诺什·卡达尔，军队由党与国防部共同控制
commanderInChief.en: The effective supreme leader was János Kádár, with the armed forces controlled jointly by the party and the Ministry of Defence

technology.zh: 武器装备主要采用苏联标准，拥有装甲车辆、火炮、喷气机和较完善的区域防空体系，但高端自主研发能力有限。
technology.en: Weapons and equipment largely followed Soviet standards, including armored vehicles, artillery, jets, and a fairly developed regional air-defense system, though advanced domestic research capacity was limited.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自冷战军事对峙、对1956年式内部动荡重现的担忧，以及华约内部战略要求。
threats.en: The main threats came from Cold War military confrontation, fears of a recurrence of internal unrest like that of 1956, and strategic demands within the Warsaw Pact.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约1000万，主体为马扎尔人，另有德意志人、斯洛伐克人、克罗地亚人及罗姆人等少数群体。城市化持续推进，但全国人口仍在城乡之间保持较均衡分布。
populationDescription.en: The population was about 10 million, predominantly Magyar, with German, Slovak, Croat, Roma, and other minorities. Urbanization continued to advance, though the population remained relatively balanced between town and countryside.

socialClasses.zh: 主要包括党政干部、城市工人、合作化农民、技术知识分子和小规模私人副业经营者。
socialClasses.en: Main social groups included party-state cadres, urban workers, collectivized peasants, technical intellectuals, and small-scale private sideline producers.

allies.zh: 主要盟友为苏联、华约国家和经互会成员，外交与安全政策总体嵌入苏联主导体系。
allies.en: Its principal allies were the Soviet Union, Warsaw Pact states, and Comecon members, with foreign and security policy broadly embedded in the Soviet-led system.

enemies.zh: 官方敌对对象为北约阵营及其“反社会主义势力”，同时对西方支持的政治渗透保持警惕。
enemies.en: Its official adversaries were the NATO bloc and other “anti-socialist forces,” while remaining wary of Western-backed political penetration.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交上忠于华约和经互会框架，同时在不突破苏联底线的前提下追求有限的经济务实主义和国际缓和。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy remained loyal to the Warsaw Pact and Comecon while pursuing limited economic pragmatism and détente, so long as Soviet red lines were not crossed.

era.zh: 冷战早期社会主义工业恢复与务实调整阶段
era.en: Early Cold War phase of socialist industrial recovery and pragmatic adjustment

keyInnovations.zh: 车辆制造、医药化工、铝工业、电力扩建和农业机械化改进。
keyInnovations.en: Vehicle manufacturing, pharmaceutical chemicals, aluminum industry growth, electric-power expansion, and improvements in agricultural mechanization.

strengths.zh: 工业基础较扎实，行政控制力强，政策较周边部分国家更务实，首都在区域中具有明显经济文化优势。
strengths.en: It had a fairly solid industrial base, strong administrative control, policies more pragmatic than those of some neighbors, and a capital with clear regional economic and cultural advantages.

weaknesses.zh: 政治合法性仍受1956年阴影影响，经济创新不足，对苏联军事与外交依赖明显。
weaknesses.en: Political legitimacy remained shadowed by 1956, economic innovation was limited, and dependence on the Soviet Union in military and foreign affairs was evident.

outlook.zh: 若卡达尔继续推行稳定优先和渐进改善民生的路线，匈牙利有望在东欧社会主义国家中形成相对温和且较有效的治理模式。
outlook.en: If Kádár continued his stability-first and gradual-improvement approach, Hungary could develop a relatively moderate and comparatively effective model of governance within Eastern Europe’s socialist states.

description.zh: 1962年的匈牙利是一个在1956年后趋于稳定、由共产党统治并逐步走向务实治理的东欧社会主义国家。
description.en: Hungary in 1962 was a communist-ruled Eastern European socialist state that had stabilized after 1956 and was gradually moving toward more pragmatic governance.

dynasty.zh: 英联邦时代澳大利亚联邦政府（孟席斯政府）
dynasty.en: Commonwealth-era Commonwealth of Australia under the Menzies government

governmentForm.zh: 澳大利亚在1962年是英联邦内的联邦议会君主立宪制国家，由总理领导政府，英国君主为国家元首。
governmentForm.en: In 1962, Australia was a federal parliamentary constitutional monarchy within the Commonwealth, with government led by the prime minister and the British monarch as head of state.

socialStructure.zh: 社会以城市中产阶级、工薪阶层和农村生产者为主体，战后移民持续改变人口结构。英国裔与爱尔兰裔居民占主导地位，南欧移民比重上升。原住民在法律与社会地位上仍处于明显边缘化状态。
socialStructure.en: Society was centered on an urban middle class, wage-earning workers, and rural producers, while postwar immigration continued reshaping the population. People of British and Irish background remained dominant, with a growing share of Southern European migrants. Aboriginal Australians remained clearly marginalized in both legal and social status.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层主要由联邦与州级政客、高级公务员、司法精英、工商金融界领袖组成。孟席斯时期的自由党—乡村党联盟与商业保守派联系紧密。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted mainly of federal and state politicians, senior civil servants, judicial elites, and leaders in business and finance. The Liberal–Country coalition under Menzies was closely linked to commercial and conservative interests.

succession.zh: 政府更替通过议会选举与执政联盟组阁完成，而非世袭。国家元首名义上由英国王位继承规则决定，在澳大利亚由总督代表行使宪制职能。
succession.en: Changes of government occurred through parliamentary elections and coalition formation rather than hereditary succession. The head of state was determined nominally by British royal succession, with constitutional functions exercised in Australia by the governor-general.

structure.zh: 澳大利亚实行联邦制，权力在联邦政府与六州之间分配，另有若干领地受联邦直接管理。1962年的联邦政治由众议院多数党或联盟主导，参议院承担复核与州利益代表功能。
structure.en: Australia operated as a federation, with powers divided between the Commonwealth and six states, while several territories were administered directly by the federal government. In 1962, federal politics was dominated by the majority party or coalition in the House of Representatives, while the Senate served as a revising chamber and represented state interests.

function.zh: 协调内阁政策、联邦行政与跨部门事务。
function.en: Coordinated cabinet policy, federal administration, and interdepartmental affairs.

function.zh: 负责预算、税收政策、宏观经济分析与联邦财政管理。
function.en: Handled the budget, tax policy, macroeconomic analysis, and federal fiscal management.

function.zh: 统筹国防政策、军种协调、战略规划与军备采购。
function.en: Oversaw defence policy, service coordination, strategic planning, and military procurement.

function.zh: 管理战后移民引进、入境审查与安置政策。
function.en: Managed postwar immigration intake, entry screening, and settlement policy.

localAdmin.zh: 州政府负责教育、警务、卫生和大量地方基础设施。地方议会处理市政、道路、供水和地方规划，但财政上常依赖州与联邦拨款。
localAdmin.en: State governments handled education, policing, health, and much local infrastructure. Local councils managed municipal services, roads, water supply, and planning, but often depended financially on state and federal grants.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以英国普通法传统为基础，并结合联邦与州立法。高等法院是最终宪法解释机关，但对英国枢密院司法委员会的上诉渠道仍部分存在。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based on the British common law tradition combined with federal and state statutes. The High Court served as the final interpreter of the constitution, though some avenues of appeal to the Judicial Committee of the Privy Council still remained.

taxationSystem.zh: 联邦财政主要依靠所得税、关税、消费税和公司税。战后税制较集中，联邦政府通过财政转移支付对州拥有较强影响力。
taxationSystem.en: Federal finance relied mainly on income tax, customs duties, excise, and company taxation. The postwar tax system was relatively centralized, giving the Commonwealth strong influence over the states through transfers.

religion.zh: 基督教

culturalAchievements.zh: 战后澳大利亚在文学、广播、体育和国家文化机构建设方面持续发展。国家认同逐渐从单纯英帝国附属转向更独立的澳大利亚民族意识。
culturalAchievements.en: Postwar Australia continued to develop in literature, broadcasting, sport, and national cultural institutions. National identity was gradually shifting from a purely British imperial attachment toward a more distinct Australian consciousness.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族（英语为主）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Germanic branch (predominantly English)

philosophy.zh: 英式自由保守主义、议会民主、基督教社会伦理与冷战反共思想并存。
philosophy.en: British liberal conservatism, parliamentary democracy, Christian social ethics, and Cold War anti-communism coexisted.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母书写的现代英语
writingSystem.en: Modern English written in the Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 澳大利亚经济在1962年处于发达国家行列，依托羊毛、矿业、制造业和受保护的国内市场。其增长受资源出口、人口扩张和基础设施投资推动，但对英国市场和初级产品价格仍较敏感。
gdpDescription.en: Australia in 1962 had a developed economy supported by wool, mining, manufacturing, and a protected domestic market. Growth was driven by resource exports, population expansion, and infrastructure investment, though it remained sensitive to the British market and commodity prices.

mainIndustries.zh: 羊毛、畜牧、采矿、钢铁、汽车装配、食品加工、建筑业
mainIndustries.en: Wool, livestock, mining, steel, automobile assembly, food processing, construction

tradeGoods.zh: 羊毛、小麦、肉类、铅锌、煤炭、糖、制造品
tradeGoods.en: Wool, wheat, meat, lead-zinc, coal, sugar, manufactured goods

householdWealth.zh: 城市家庭拥有较高住房拥有率和耐用消费品普及率，中产阶级规模扩大。农村财富差异较大，原住民与部分新移民家庭资产积累明显偏低。
householdWealth.en: Urban households enjoyed relatively high home ownership and broad access to consumer durables, with a growing middle class. Rural wealth varied widely, and Aboriginal families as well as some newer migrants had markedly lower asset accumulation.

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济为主，辅以关税保护、汇率管理和选择性国家干预的混合经济。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy centered on markets, supplemented by tariff protection, exchange management, and selective state intervention.

source.en: Company tax and other direct taxes

category.zh: 社会服务与退伍军人支出

treasuryDescription.zh: 联邦财政状况总体稳健，具备较强借贷能力和英联邦金融网络支撑。储备与信贷政策仍受固定汇率和国际收支约束。
treasuryDescription.en: The federal fiscal position was generally sound, supported by strong borrowing capacity and Commonwealth financial networks. Reserves and credit policy were still constrained by fixed exchange-rate arrangements and the balance of payments.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏向保守平衡，但在经济波动时会配合公共投资和信贷调节以维持就业与增长。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy leaned toward conservative balance, but public investment and credit management were used during fluctuations to maintain employment and growth.

description.zh: 负责本土防务、区域部署和同盟作战准备，1962年逐步扩大正规力量。
description.en: Responsible for homeland defence, regional deployment, and allied war readiness, with regular forces gradually expanding in 1962.

description.zh: 维持海上交通线安全、舰队巡逻与英联邦合作行动。
description.en: Maintained sea-lane security, fleet patrols, and Commonwealth cooperative operations.

description.zh: 承担制空、运输、海上巡逻和对地支援任务。
description.en: Handled air superiority, transport, maritime patrol, and ground-support missions.

commanderInChief.zh: 名义统帅为澳大利亚女王伊丽莎白二世，由总督代表；政府实际由总理罗伯特·孟席斯及国防部长领导
commanderInChief.en: Nominal commander-in-chief was Queen Elizabeth II of Australia, represented by the governor-general; actual control rested with Prime Minister Robert Menzies and the defence minister

technology.zh: 军队装备达到中等现代化水平，使用喷气式战机、驱逐舰、现代通信系统及英美制武器，但国防工业规模有限，较依赖盟国技术与采购。
technology.en: The forces were moderately modernized, using jet aircraft, destroyers, modern communications, and British and American weapons, but the domestic defence industry was limited and relied heavily on allied technology and procurement.

threats.zh: 主要安全担忧来自冷战在东南亚的扩散、印尼周边局势不稳、共产主义影响外溢以及对海上交通线的潜在威胁。
threats.en: Main security concerns came from the spread of the Cold War into Southeast Asia, instability around Indonesia, communist influence, and potential threats to maritime lines of communication.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约1050万，集中于东南沿海大城市与农业带。战后移民政策提升了欧洲移民比重，但“白澳政策”在1962年仍未完全废除。
populationDescription.en: The population was about 10.5 million, concentrated in major southeastern coastal cities and agricultural belts. Postwar immigration increased the European migrant share, but the White Australia policy had not yet been fully dismantled in 1962.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为金融工商精英与专业人士，中层为公务员、白领和小业主，下层为产业工人、农业劳动者及边缘群体；原住民群体在社会阶层中长期处于底部。
socialClasses.en: The upper strata included business, financial, and professional elites; the middle strata included civil servants, white-collar employees, and small proprietors; the lower strata included industrial workers, farm laborers, and marginalized groups, with Aboriginal communities long placed near the bottom of the hierarchy.

allies.zh: 英国、美国、新西兰、加拿大及东南亚条约组织相关伙伴。
allies.en: The United Kingdom, the United States, New Zealand, Canada, and partners linked to SEATO.

enemies.zh: 无正式宣战敌国，但将国际共产主义阵营，尤其在亚洲的扩张视为主要战略对手。
enemies.en: It had no formally declared wartime enemy, but regarded the international communist bloc, especially expansion in Asia, as its main strategic adversary.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策强调英美同盟、反共遏制、英联邦联系和对亚太周边的有限参与。澳大利亚逐渐从单纯依赖英国转向更重视与美国的安全协作。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy emphasized alliance with Britain and the United States, anti-communist containment, Commonwealth ties, and limited engagement in the Asia-Pacific. Australia was gradually shifting from reliance on Britain toward deeper security cooperation with the United States.

era.zh: 冷战早期至中期工业化社会

keyInnovations.zh: 水电与电网扩建、喷气航空、远程无线电通信、矿业机械化、雪山计划等大型工程代表其技术能力。
keyInnovations.en: Hydroelectric and power-grid expansion, jet aviation, long-range radio communications, mechanized mining, and large projects such as the Snowy Mountains Scheme represented its technological capacity.

strengths.zh: 资源丰富、制度稳定、人口受教育程度较高，并受英美安全体系支持。
strengths.en: It possessed abundant resources, stable institutions, a relatively well-educated population, and support from the British-American security system.

weaknesses.zh: 人口规模有限、市场较小、对初级产品出口依赖较高，且原住民与移民政策问题削弱社会整合。
weaknesses.en: It had a limited population, a relatively small market, high dependence on primary exports, and social integration problems related to Aboriginal policy and immigration.

outlook.zh: 若能继续工业多元化并深化亚太联系，澳大利亚有望在1960年代后期保持繁荣与地区影响力上升。
outlook.en: If it continued industrial diversification and deepened Asia-Pacific ties, Australia was well positioned to sustain prosperity and gain regional influence in the later 1960s.

description.zh: 1962年的澳大利亚是一个富裕、稳定并深度嵌入西方冷战同盟体系的联邦议会国家。
description.en: Australia in 1962 was a prosperous, stable federal parliamentary state deeply embedded in the Western Cold War alliance system.

dynasty.zh: 英联邦时代新西兰王国政府（霍利约克政府）
dynasty.en: Commonwealth-era government of the Realm of New Zealand under the Holyoake government

governmentForm.zh: 新西兰在1962年是英联邦内的议会君主立宪制国家，由总理及内阁执政，英国君主兼任新西兰国家元首。
governmentForm.en: In 1962, New Zealand was a parliamentary constitutional monarchy within the Commonwealth, governed by the prime minister and cabinet, with the British monarch also serving as New Zealand’s head of state.

socialStructure.zh: 社会结构以农业出口经济支撑的中产阶级和工薪阶层为主，福利国家制度较成熟。欧裔新西兰人占多数，毛利人虽具法律承认地位，但在收入、住房和教育方面仍存在显著差距。
socialStructure.en: The social structure was dominated by a middle class and wage-earning population supported by an agricultural export economy, with a relatively mature welfare state. European New Zealanders formed the majority, while Māori had legal recognition but still faced marked gaps in income, housing, and education.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层由国民党与工党政治精英、高级公务员、法官、牧业与商业界领袖构成。社会上层规模较小，但彼此联系紧密，精英政治色彩较明显。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted of political elites from the National and Labour parties, senior civil servants, judges, and leaders in pastoral and commercial circles. The upper stratum was relatively small but tightly interconnected, giving politics a distinct elite character.

succession.zh: 政府通过议会选举和平更替，首相由拥有众议院多数支持者出任。王位继承依英国王室继承规则办理，由总督在国内代表君主。
succession.en: Governments changed peacefully through parliamentary elections, with the prime minister drawn from the person commanding a majority in the House. Royal succession followed British rules, while the governor-general represented the monarch domestically.

structure.zh: 新西兰实行单一制议会政府，中央政府权力集中，地方机构权限较有限。1962年仍为一院制体制，众议院主导立法与财政，内阁在行政上具有核心地位。
structure.en: New Zealand operated a unitary parliamentary government with power concentrated at the center and relatively limited local authority. In 1962 it remained unicameral, with the House of Representatives dominating legislation and finance, while the cabinet held the central executive role.

function.zh: 负责内阁协调、政策统筹与安全事务联络。
function.en: Handled cabinet coordination, policy oversight, and liaison on security matters.

function.zh: 负责预算编制、财政控制、经济预测与公共债务管理。
function.en: Managed budget preparation, fiscal control, economic forecasting, and public debt administration.

function.zh: 监管农业生产、检疫、出口品质与农村发展。
function.en: Oversaw agricultural production, quarantine, export quality, and rural development.

function.zh: 负责国防规划、军种协调与同盟防务合作。
function.en: Responsible for defence planning, service coordination, and allied defence cooperation.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由市政会、郡议会和专门委员会组成，负责道路、供水和地方服务。地方财政能力有限，对中央拨款与立法框架依赖较强。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was composed of borough councils, county councils, and special boards responsible for roads, water, and local services. Their fiscal capacity was limited, and they depended heavily on central grants and legislation.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系源于英国普通法，并结合新西兰议会立法与行政法规。法院体系运作稳定，司法独立受到普遍尊重。
legalSystem.en: The legal system derived from British common law, combined with New Zealand parliamentary statutes and regulations. The court system functioned stably, and judicial independence was widely respected.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以所得税、销售税、关税和工资相关征收为主。高福利支出要求中央保持较稳定和广泛的税基。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied mainly on income tax, sales tax, customs duties, and payroll-related levies. High welfare spending required the central government to maintain a stable and broad tax base.

religion.zh: 基督教

culturalAchievements.zh: 新西兰在1960年代初已形成较鲜明的国家文化，包括橄榄球传统、英语文学与公共广播体系。毛利文化在官方层面获得一定承认，但尚未进入后来的全面复兴阶段。
culturalAchievements.en: By the early 1960s New Zealand had developed a distinct national culture, including rugby traditions, English-language literature, and public broadcasting. Māori culture had gained some official recognition, though it had not yet entered the fuller revival seen later.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族（英语）与南岛语系（毛利语）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Germanic branch (English) and Austronesian (Māori)

philosophy.zh: 英式议会民主、社会福利国家理念、基督教道德传统与温和保守主义并存。
philosophy.en: British parliamentary democracy, welfare-state ideals, Christian moral traditions, and moderate conservatism coexisted.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母书写的英语与毛利语
writingSystem.en: English and Māori written in the Latin alphabet

gdpDescription.zh: 新西兰在1962年属于高收入小型经济体，生活水平较高，但对农牧产品出口和英国市场依赖极强。经济整体稳定，却容易受到国际羊毛、乳制品和肉类价格波动影响。
gdpDescription.en: In 1962, New Zealand was a high-income small economy with a high standard of living, but it was heavily dependent on pastoral exports and the British market. The economy was generally stable, yet vulnerable to fluctuations in world prices for wool, dairy, and meat.

mainIndustries.zh: 乳制品、羊毛、肉类加工、林业、食品制造、建筑业
mainIndustries.en: Dairy, wool, meat processing, forestry, food manufacturing, construction

tradeGoods.zh: 黄油、奶酪、羊毛、冷冻肉、木材、羊皮
tradeGoods.en: Butter, cheese, wool, frozen meat, timber, sheepskins

householdWealth.zh: 多数家庭拥有较稳定住房条件和耐用品消费能力，福利制度减轻了极端贫困。农村牧场主与城市专业阶层财富较高，毛利家庭平均资产普遍偏低。
householdWealth.en: Most households enjoyed stable housing conditions and access to consumer durables, while the welfare state reduced extreme poverty. Rural pastoral owners and urban professionals held higher wealth, whereas Māori households generally had lower average assets.

economicSystem.zh: 以市场交换为基础、伴随较高政府调控和福利支出的混合经济。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy based on markets, accompanied by substantial government regulation and welfare expenditure.

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政总体稳健，但小型开放经济的外汇与预算状况容易受出口收益影响。政府依靠审慎借贷与贸易收入维持福利国家运作。
treasuryDescription.en: The fiscal position was generally sound, though the foreign exchange and budgetary condition of this small open economy was sensitive to export earnings. The government sustained the welfare state through prudent borrowing and trade revenues.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策注重充分就业、社会保障与预算平衡之间的折中，必要时通过进口管制与公共投资稳定经济。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy sought a balance among full employment, social security, and budget stability, using import controls and public investment when needed to stabilize the economy.

description.zh: 规模较小，重在本土防卫、英联邦协作和有限海外部署。
description.en: Small in size, focused on homeland defence, Commonwealth cooperation, and limited overseas deployment.

description.zh: 负责近海巡逻、护航和海上联合作战支援。
description.en: Responsible for coastal patrol, escort duties, and support for joint maritime operations.

description.zh: 承担运输、海上巡逻、训练和有限空中支援任务。
description.en: Handled transport, maritime patrol, training, and limited air-support roles.

commanderInChief.zh: 名义统帅为新西兰女王伊丽莎白二世，由总督代表；实际由总理基思·霍利约克及国防部长领导
commanderInChief.en: Nominal commander-in-chief was Queen Elizabeth II of New Zealand, represented by the governor-general; actual direction rested with Prime Minister Keith Holyoake and the defence minister

technology.zh: 军队装备整体现代化程度中等，依赖英制和部分美制舰机与通信设备，具备基本海空监视和远程运输能力，但缺乏重型独立作战能力。
technology.en: The forces were moderately modernized, relying on British and some American ships, aircraft, and communications equipment. They possessed basic maritime surveillance and long-range transport capability, but lacked heavy independent warfighting capacity.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自冷战格局下亚太海上交通线不稳、东南亚局势恶化及对盟国义务的战略牵连。
threats.en: Principal threats came from instability in Asia-Pacific sea lanes under the Cold War, deterioration in Southeast Asia, and strategic entanglement through alliance commitments.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约250万，城市化水平较高但仍与农业出口经济紧密相连。欧裔居民占绝大多数，毛利人口比例上升并开始向城市迁移。
populationDescription.en: The population was about 2.5 million, relatively urbanized but still closely tied to an agricultural export economy. People of European descent formed the large majority, while the Māori share was rising and increasingly moving into cities.

socialClasses.zh: 社会分层相对温和，上层为农牧业主、商界和专业人士，中层为工薪家庭与公务员，下层包括低收入工人和部分毛利社区。
socialClasses.en: Social stratification was relatively moderate: the upper layer included pastoral owners, business circles, and professionals; the middle layer consisted of wage-earning families and civil servants; the lower layer included low-income workers and parts of Māori communities.

allies.zh: 英国、澳大利亚、美国及英联邦伙伴。
allies.en: The United Kingdom, Australia, the United States, and Commonwealth partners.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，但将亚洲共产主义扩张视为主要安全挑战。
enemies.en: It had no formal enemy state, but regarded communist expansion in Asia as the principal security challenge.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策强调英联邦联系、与澳大利亚协调以及对西方遏制战略的支持。其对外姿态通常谨慎务实，但在联盟框架内愿承担有限责任。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy emphasized Commonwealth ties, coordination with Australia, and support for Western containment strategy. Its external posture was usually cautious and pragmatic, but it was willing to shoulder limited responsibilities within alliance frameworks.

era.zh: 冷战早期至中期高收入农工混合社会
era.en: Early-to-mid Cold War high-income agro-industrial society

keyInnovations.zh: 冷冻运输链、乳制品加工、电力工程、农业机械化和公共广播体系是其核心技术成就。
keyInnovations.en: Refrigerated transport chains, dairy processing, power engineering, agricultural mechanization, and public broadcasting formed its core technological achievements.

strengths.zh: 社会稳定、福利制度完善、人均收入高、农业出口竞争力强。
strengths.en: It had social stability, a strong welfare system, high per-capita income, and competitive agricultural exports.

weaknesses.zh: 经济规模小、出口结构单一、对英国市场依赖过重，军事实力有限。
weaknesses.en: Its economy was small, exports were narrowly based, dependence on the British market was heavy, and military power was limited.

outlook.zh: 若能逐步实现市场多元化并改善毛利社会地位，新西兰可继续维持高生活水平和稳定政治秩序。
outlook.en: If it gradually diversified its markets and improved Māori social conditions, New Zealand could maintain both a high standard of living and political stability.

description.zh: 1962年的新西兰是一个富裕而规模较小的议会君主国，其安全与经济都深受英联邦和全球农产品贸易影响。
description.en: New Zealand in 1962 was a prosperous but small parliamentary monarchy whose security and economy were deeply shaped by the Commonwealth and global agricultural trade.

ruler.zh: 吉列尔莫·莱昂·巴伦西亚

dynasty.zh: 民族阵线时期哥伦比亚共和国（巴伦西亚政府）
dynasty.en: Republic of Colombia during the National Front era under the Valencia government

governmentForm.zh: 哥伦比亚在1962年是总统制共和国，处于自由党与保守党轮流执政的“民族阵线”体制之下。
governmentForm.en: In 1962, Colombia was a presidential republic operating under the National Front system, in which the Liberal and Conservative parties alternated in power.

socialStructure.zh: 社会高度分层，地主、城市精英和传统党派领袖控制政治与经济资源。农村贫困广泛存在，土地分配不均严重。自“暴力时期”以来，乡村武装、党派仇杀和地方割据持续破坏社会秩序。
socialStructure.en: Society was highly stratified, with landlords, urban elites, and traditional party leaders controlling political and economic resources. Rural poverty was widespread and land distribution was severely unequal. Since La Violencia, rural armed groups, partisan killings, and local fragmentation had continued to disrupt social order.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层由保守党与自由党寡头、地主、军方高层、教会精英以及咖啡出口利益集团构成。民族阵线减少了两党公开内战风险，但也排斥了体制外政治力量。
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted of Conservative and Liberal oligarchs, landowners, senior military officers, church elites, and coffee-export interests. The National Front reduced the risk of open civil war between the two parties, but it also excluded political forces outside the system.

succession.zh: 总统通过选举产生，但民族阵线规定自由党与保守党轮流执政，并分享公职名额。此安排在短期内有助于稳定政局，却削弱了政治竞争的开放性。
succession.en: The president was chosen by election, but the National Front required Liberals and Conservatives to alternate in office and share public posts. This arrangement promoted short-term stability, but reduced the openness of political competition.

structure.zh: 中央政府采取总统制，行政权较强，省与市镇在法律上存在但受中央和地方政治强人双重影响。1962年的国家机器仍在试图恢复对乡村暴力地区的控制。
structure.en: The central government operated a presidential system with a strong executive, while departments and municipalities existed legally but were influenced both by the center and by local political bosses. In 1962 the state apparatus was still trying to restore control over rural zones affected by violence.

function.zh: 负责国内行政、地方关系、公共秩序协调与政治管理。
function.en: Managed domestic administration, local relations, public-order coordination, and political affairs.

name.en: Ministry of Finance and Public Credit

function.zh: 负责税收、预算、债务、货币协同与对外信贷事务。
function.en: Handled taxation, budgeting, debt, monetary coordination, and external credit affairs.

function.zh: 统辖军队、国内治安行动与反游击部署。
function.en: Directed the armed forces, domestic security operations, and anti-guerrilla deployment.

function.zh: 负责农业政策、土地改革尝试与农村发展项目。
function.en: Oversaw agricultural policy, land-reform efforts, and rural development programs.

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政划分为省与市镇，但大量地区受党派网络、地主势力与军警驻防影响。偏远山区和边缘乡村的国家治理能力明显不足。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was organized into departments and municipalities, but many areas were shaped by party networks, landlord power, and military-police presence. State capacity was clearly weak in remote mountains and peripheral rural zones.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系属于大陆法系，受宪法、成文法与行政法传统支配。尽管司法制度正式存在，但在暴力频发地区，执法能力与司法独立常受限制。
legalSystem.en: The legal system belonged to the civil-law tradition, governed by the constitution, codified statutes, and administrative law. Although the judiciary formally existed, enforcement capacity and judicial independence were often constrained in violence-prone areas.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收主要来自关税、消费税、所得税和与出口相关收入。由于征税能力不均和地方控制薄弱，财政汲取能力受到限制。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation came mainly from customs duties, excise, income taxes, and export-related revenues. Fiscal extraction was constrained by uneven tax capacity and weak local control.

religion.zh: 天主教

culturalAchievements.zh: 哥伦比亚在文学、新闻出版、音乐和地区民俗文化方面具有深厚传统。尽管政治暴力严重，城市文化生活仍保持活跃，知识界开始更加关注社会不平等与国家认同问题。
