description.zh: 1962年的毛里求斯是英国殖民地，甘蔗种植园经济，多族群社会。
description.en: In 1962, Mauritius was a British colony with a sugar plantation economy and multi-ethnic society.

description.zh: 美国侦察机发现苏联在古巴秘密部署中程弹道导弹，肯尼迪总统下令对古巴实施海上封锁。美苏两国在长达十三天的对峙中将世界推至核战争边缘。
description.en: American reconnaissance aircraft discovered Soviet medium-range ballistic missiles secretly deployed in Cuba. President Kennedy ordered a naval blockade of Cuba, and the thirteen-day standoff between the US and USSR pushed the world to the brink of nuclear war.

description.zh: 中国与印度在喜马拉雅争议边界地区爆发全面军事冲突。中国人民解放军在东西两线同时发动进攻，印军遭受重大失败，战争以中国单方面宣布停火告终。
description.en: China and India erupted into full-scale military conflict along the disputed Himalayan border. The PLA launched simultaneous offensives on both eastern and western fronts, inflicting major defeats on Indian forces. The war ended with China's unilateral ceasefire declaration.

description.zh: 经过八年血腥独立战争，法属阿尔及利亚通过全民公投宣布独立，结束了长达132年的法国殖民统治。数十万法裔殖民者被迫撤离。
description.en: After eight years of bloody independence war, French Algeria declared independence through a referendum, ending 132 years of French colonial rule. Hundreds of thousands of French settlers were forced to evacuate.

title.en: Partial Nuclear Test Ban Treaty Signed

description.zh: 美国、苏联和英国在莫斯科签署《部分禁止核试验条约》，禁止在大气层、外层空间和水下进行核试验。这是冷战期间首个重要的军备控制协议。
description.en: The United States, Soviet Union, and United Kingdom signed the Partial Nuclear Test Ban Treaty in Moscow, banning nuclear tests in the atmosphere, outer space, and underwater. It was the first major arms control agreement of the Cold War.

description.zh: 美国第35任总统约翰·F·肯尼迪在德克萨斯州达拉斯遭枪击身亡，副总统林登·约翰逊随即宣誓就任总统。这一事件深刻震撼了美国社会和国际政治格局。
description.en: The 35th President of the United States, John F. Kennedy, was assassinated by gunfire in Dallas, Texas. Vice President Lyndon B. Johnson was immediately sworn in as President. The event profoundly shook American society and the international political landscape.

description.zh: 美国声称其驱逐舰在北部湾遭到北越鱼雷艇攻击，国会随即通过《北部湾决议》，授权总统在越南采取一切必要军事行动。这成为美国全面介入越战的法律依据。
description.en: The US claimed its destroyers were attacked by North Vietnamese torpedo boats in the Gulf of Tonkin. Congress promptly passed the Gulf of Tonkin Resolution, authorizing the President to take all necessary military action in Vietnam.

description.zh: 中国在新疆罗布泊成功引爆第一颗原子弹，成为世界第五个拥有核武器的国家。这一成就打破了超级大国的核垄断，显著改变了亚洲和全球的战略平衡。
description.en: China successfully detonated its first atomic bomb at Lop Nur, Xinjiang, becoming the fifth nation to possess nuclear weapons. This achievement broke the nuclear monopoly of the superpowers and significantly altered the strategic balance in Asia and globally.

title.zh: 美国地面部队进入越南

description.zh: 美国海军陆战队在岘港登陆，标志着美军地面部队正式投入越南战场。至1968年高峰期，驻越美军总数将超过50万人。
description.en: US Marines landed at Da Nang, marking the official commitment of American ground forces to the Vietnam War. At its peak in 1968, the total number of US troops in Vietnam would exceed 500,000.

description.zh: 毛泽东发动无产阶级文化大革命，红卫兵运动席卷全国，大量知识分子和干部遭受迫害。这场政治运动持续十年，给中国社会、文化和经济造成巨大破坏。
description.en: Mao Zedong launched the Great Proletarian Cultural Revolution. The Red Guard movement swept across the country, and large numbers of intellectuals and cadres were persecuted. This political movement lasted ten years, causing enormous damage to Chinese society, culture, and economy.

title.zh: 第三次中东战争（六日战争）

description.zh: 以色列对埃及、叙利亚和约旦发动先发制人的军事打击，仅六天即占领西奈半岛、戈兰高地、约旦河西岸和加沙地带。这场战争深刻改变了中东地缘政治格局。
description.en: Israel launched preemptive military strikes against Egypt, Syria, and Jordan, occupying the Sinai Peninsula, Golan Heights, West Bank, and Gaza Strip in just six days. The war fundamentally altered the geopolitical landscape of the Middle East.

description.zh: 北越和越共在越南农历新年期间对南越发动大规模突然袭击，攻击超过100个城市和军事目标。虽然军事上遭到击退，但这次攻势严重动摇了美国公众对越战的支持。
description.en: North Vietnam and the Viet Cong launched a massive surprise attack on South Vietnam during the Lunar New Year, striking over 100 cities and military targets. Though militarily repulsed, the offensive severely undermined American public support for the Vietnam War.

title.zh: 苏联入侵捷克斯洛伐克

description.zh: 苏联率领华沙条约组织军队入侵捷克斯洛伐克，镇压了杜布切克领导的“布拉格之春”改革运动。这一事件标志着勃列日涅夫主义的确立——苏联宣称有权干预社会主义阵营内部事务。
description.en: The Soviet Union led Warsaw Pact forces in invading Czechoslovakia, crushing the 'Prague Spring' reform movement led by Dubček. This event established the Brezhnev Doctrine — the Soviet claim of the right to intervene in the internal affairs of the socialist bloc.

description.zh: 美国宇航员尼尔·阿姆斯特朗和巴兹·奥尔德林乘坐阿波罗11号成功登陆月球，阿姆斯特朗成为踏上月球的第一人。这一成就标志着美国在太空竞赛中取得决定性胜利。
description.en: American astronauts Neil Armstrong and Buzz Aldrin successfully landed on the Moon aboard Apollo 11, with Armstrong becoming the first person to walk on the lunar surface. This achievement marked a decisive American victory in the Space Race.

title.en: Sino-Soviet Border Conflict at Zhenbao Island

description.zh: 中国与苏联在乌苏里江珍宝岛（达曼斯基岛）爆发武装冲突，双方动用了炮兵和装甲部队。这场冲突标志着中苏关系彻底破裂，全球共产主义阵营正式分裂。
description.en: China and the Soviet Union engaged in armed conflict at Zhenbao Island (Damansky Island) on the Ussuri River, both sides deploying artillery and armored forces. The conflict marked the complete rupture of Sino-Soviet relations and the formal split in the global communist bloc.

description.zh: 印度与巴基斯坦因克什米尔争端再次爆发全面战争。双方在陆地和空中展开大规模作战，最终在联合国调停下签署《塔什干宣言》实现停火。
description.en: India and Pakistan erupted into full-scale war again over the Kashmir dispute. Both sides engaged in large-scale land and air operations, eventually signing the Tashkent Declaration under UN mediation to achieve a ceasefire.

description.zh: 32个非洲独立国家的首脑在亚的斯亚贝巴签署《非洲统一组织宪章》，宣告非洲统一组织正式成立。该组织致力于促进非洲团结、消除殖民主义和推动经济合作。
description.en: Heads of 32 independent African nations signed the Charter of the Organization of African Unity in Addis Ababa, formally establishing the OAU. The organization was dedicated to promoting African unity, eliminating colonialism, and advancing economic cooperation.

title.zh: 尼日利亚内战（比亚法拉战争）

description.zh: 尼日利亚东南部伊博族主导地区宣布独立为比亚法拉共和国，联邦政府随即发动军事镇压。这场持续三年的内战造成约一百万人死于战斗和饥荒。
description.en: The Igbo-dominated southeastern region of Nigeria declared independence as the Republic of Biafra, prompting a military crackdown by the federal government. The three-year civil war resulted in approximately one million deaths from combat and famine.

title.zh: 苏联首位女性宇航员进入太空

description.zh: 苏联宇航员瓦莲京娜·捷列什科娃乘坐东方6号飞船进入太空，成为人类历史上首位女性宇航员。她在太空中环绕地球飞行48圈，历时近三天。
description.en: Soviet cosmonaut Valentina Tereshkova entered space aboard Vostok 6, becoming the first woman in history to travel to space. She orbited the Earth 48 times over nearly three days.

description.zh: 印度尼西亚军方以粉碎所谓共产党政变阴谋为名，发动大规模清洗行动。苏哈托将军逐步夺取权力，估计有50万至100万人在随后的屠杀中遇难，印尼共产党被彻底消灭。
description.en: The Indonesian military launched a massive purge under the pretext of crushing an alleged communist coup plot. General Suharto gradually seized power, and an estimated 500,000 to 1 million people were killed in the subsequent massacres.

description.zh: 美国总统约翰逊签署具有里程碑意义的《民权法案》，从法律上禁止基于种族、肤色、宗教、性别或国籍的歧视。这是美国民权运动取得的最重要立法成果。
description.en: President Johnson signed the landmark Civil Rights Act, legally prohibiting discrimination based on race, color, religion, sex, or national origin. It was the most important legislative achievement of the American civil rights movement.

title.zh: 法国退出北约军事一体化
title.en: France Withdraws from NATO Military Command

description.zh: 戴高乐总统宣布法国退出北大西洋公约组织的军事一体化指挥机构，要求所有外国军事基地撤出法国领土。此举体现了法国追求独立外交和防务政策的意志。
description.en: President de Gaulle announced France's withdrawal from NATO's integrated military command structure, demanding the removal of all foreign military bases from French territory.

title.zh: 欧洲共同体合并条约生效
title.en: European Communities Merger Treaty Takes Effect

description.zh: 欧洲经济共同体、欧洲煤钢共同体和欧洲原子能共同体正式合并为统一的欧洲共同体，设立单一的委员会和理事会。这是欧洲一体化进程中的重要里程碑。
description.en: The European Economic Community, European Coal and Steel Community, and European Atomic Energy Community formally merged into unified European Communities with a single Commission and Council.

description.zh: 美国、苏联、英国等国签署《不扩散核武器条约》，旨在防止核武器和核技术的扩散、促进核裁军及和平利用核能。该条约成为国际核不扩散体系的基石。
description.en: The United States, Soviet Union, United Kingdom, and other nations signed the Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty, aimed at preventing the spread of nuclear weapons and technology, promoting nuclear disarmament, and furthering peaceful uses of nuclear energy.

description.zh: 北也门爆发共和派与保皇派之间的内战。埃及派遣数万军队支持共和政府，沙特阿拉伯则支持保皇派。也门内战成为中东地区冷战代理战争的典型案例。
description.en: Civil war erupted in North Yemen between republican and royalist factions. Egypt dispatched tens of thousands of troops to support the republican government, while Saudi Arabia backed the royalists.

description.zh: 肯尼亚在乔莫·肯雅塔领导下脱离英国殖民统治宣告独立，成为东非地区去殖民化运动的重要标志。肯雅塔成为首任总统，推动国家建设与非洲化政策。
description.en: Kenya declared independence from British colonial rule under the leadership of Jomo Kenyatta, becoming an important symbol of the decolonization movement in East Africa.

description.zh: 苏共中央在勃列日涅夫等人策划下发动宫廷政变，以“唯意志论”和外交失败为由解除赫鲁晓夫的一切职务。勃列日涅夫接任苏共中央第一书记，开启长达十八年的执政。
description.en: The Soviet Communist Party Central Committee, in a palace coup orchestrated by Brezhnev and others, removed Khrushchev from all positions citing 'voluntarism' and diplomatic failures. Brezhnev assumed the position of First Secretary, beginning an eighteen-year rule.
